# Adyen Docs

> Developer and merchant documentation for Adyen payments, Adyen for Platforms, Issuing, point-of-sale, and risk-management products. Every page is also available as Markdown by appending `.md` to the URL.

See also [llms-full.txt](https://docs.adyen.com/llms-full.txt) for the full concatenated Markdown corpus of every page listed below.

## Home

- [Home](https://docs.adyen.com/.md)

## Transitioning to our unified Customer Area
Learn what changes to expect as the Customer Area replaces the Balance Platform Customer Area.

- [Transitioning to our unified Customer Area](https://docs.adyen.com/about-our-customer-area.md): Learn what changes to expect as the Customer Area replaces the Balance Platform Customer Area.

## Account
Learn how to manage your Adyen account through the Customer Area.

- [Account](https://docs.adyen.com/account.md): Learn how to manage your Adyen account through the Customer Area.
- [Account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/account/account-structure.md): Understand Adyen's account structure and how to set it up for your business.
- [Balances](https://docs.adyen.com/account/balances.md): Learn about the balances held in your company and merchant accounts and how to manage them.
- [Deposit](https://docs.adyen.com/account/balances/deposit.md): Learn about the deposit on your merchant account and how to manage it.
- [Next payout](https://docs.adyen.com/account/balances/next-payout.md): Learn about the next payout and why it might be negative.
- [Reserve](https://docs.adyen.com/account/balances/reserve.md): Make sure that you always have enough funds for refunds, chargebacks, and other operational expenses.
- [Defining your account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/account/define-account-structure.md): Choose an account structure that works best for your business.
- [Example account structures](https://docs.adyen.com/account/define-account-structure/example.md): Walk through an example of how a growing business makes adjustments to account structure.
- [Framework entity onboarding](https://docs.adyen.com/account/define-account-structure/framework-onboarding.md): Learn how to onboard holding companies and their affiliates.
- [Email login](https://docs.adyen.com/account/email-log-in.md): Set up email login for your Adyen Customer Area.
- [Getting paid](https://docs.adyen.com/account/getting-paid.md): Find out how you get the money from the payments processed with Adyen.
- [Configure your invoice settings](https://docs.adyen.com/account/invoice-settings.md): Manage the settings of your invoices from Adyen.
- [Manage your account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/account/manage-account-structure.md): Request new merchant accounts, and create or edit account groups.
- [Create an organization](https://docs.adyen.com/account/manage-account-structure/create-an-organization.md): Give users access to multiple company accounts with one user login.
- [Manage payments](https://docs.adyen.com/account/manage-payments.md): Learn how to look up and manage payments in your Customer Area.
- [Manage your bank account details](https://docs.adyen.com/account/manage-payout-account-details.md): Manage the bank accounts where you want to receive the funds from Adyen.
- [Manage your balances](https://docs.adyen.com/account/manage-your-balances.md): Manage the balances in your merchant accounts.
- [Multifactor authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/account/multifactor-authentication.md): Learn how to keep your account safe by setting up multifactor authentication.
- [Notification center](https://docs.adyen.com/account/notification-center.md): Stay informed of important events related to your Adyen account.
- [Pass-through payout](https://docs.adyen.com/account/pass-through-payout.md): Find out how Pass-through payout works.
- [Payments lifecycle](https://docs.adyen.com/account/payments-lifecycle.md): Learn about payment statuses and how you can track them.
- [Sales day payout](https://docs.adyen.com/account/sales-day-payout.md): Find out how Sales day payout works.
- [Single sign-on](https://docs.adyen.com/account/single-sign-on.md): Find out about single sign-on and how to set it up for your Adyen Customer Area.
- [Log in with single sign-on](https://docs.adyen.com/account/single-sign-on/log-in-with-sso.md): Learn how to verify your email address to log in to Customer Area using single sign-on (SSO).
- [Migrating users to single sign-on](https://docs.adyen.com/account/single-sign-on/migrate-users-to-sso.md): Allow your existing users access to the Customer Area using single sign-on (SSO).
- [Set up single sign-on](https://docs.adyen.com/account/single-sign-on/set-up-sso.md): Learn how to set up single sign-on (SSO) to log in to the Customer Area.
- [Supported payout currencies](https://docs.adyen.com/account/supported-currencies.md): Learn what payout currencies Adyen supports in different countries/regions.
- [Transaction description](https://docs.adyen.com/account/transaction-description.md): Find out what shoppers see on their bank statement and how you can change it.
- [User roles](https://docs.adyen.com/account/user-roles.md): Learn about the different roles and the corresponding permissions.
- [Manage users](https://docs.adyen.com/account/users.md): Allow members of your organization to manage different parts of your Adyen account.
- [Manage partner users](https://docs.adyen.com/account/users/partner-users.md): Allow partners to manage parts of your Adyen account.
- [View your balances](https://docs.adyen.com/account/view-your-balances.md): Stay updated about the balances in your company and merchant accounts.

## Adyen for Platforms
Onboard users of your platform or marketplace, process payments for them, and pay out their funds.

- [Adyen for Platforms](https://docs.adyen.com/adyen-for-platforms-model.md): Onboard users of your platform or marketplace, process payments for them, and pay out their funds.
- [Marketplaces](https://docs.adyen.com/adyen-for-platforms-model/marketplaces.md)
- [Platforms](https://docs.adyen.com/adyen-for-platforms-model/platforms.md)

## Business accounts
Enable your users to use Adyen business accounts.

- [Business accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts.md): Enable your users to use Adyen business accounts.
- [Accept direct debits in the UK](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/accept-direct-debits-uk.md): Learn how to allow your users in the UK to accept direct debits.
- [Account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/account-structure-resources.md): Understand account structures to design an integration that suits your business needs.
- [Legal entity management](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/account-structure-resources/legal-entity-management.md): Understand legal entities, their importance in the verification process and place in your account structure.
- [Account structure with business accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/account-structure-resources/platform-account-structure.md): Understand how business accounts can be connected to your platform account.
- [Get account holder information](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/aisp.md): Learn how to consume our dedicated AISP endpoints for getting account information.
- [Account statements for business accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/business-account-statement.md): Automate reconciliation and provide your users with transaction reports.
- [Compliance guidelines for business accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines.md): Learn how to remain compliant with financial regulations when offering business accounts in your marketplace or platform.
- [Account statements for business accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/account-statements.md): Learn about the requirements for account statements that you present to your users for business accounts.
- [Customer complaints and escalation](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/customer-complaints.md): Learn about types of customer complaints and proper complaint handling.
- [Customer service and support](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/customer-service-support.md): Learn about the compliance guidelines you need to follow when offering support to your users.
- [EU depositor information sheet](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/eu-depositor-info-sheet.md): Information about deposit protection in the EU.
- [Foreign exchange fees](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/foreign-exchange-fees.md): Learn about foreign exchange fees.
- [Registration as an intermediary in France](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/french-intermediary.md): To be allowed to offer Capital in France, register as an intermediary with ORIAS.
- [Keeping records](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/keeping-records.md): Learn about the guidelines for keeping records regarding financial products.
- [Material for marketing and communication with users](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/marketing-user-communication.md): Learn about the requirements and review process for your collateral material about your Capital offering.
- [Pricing and eligibility](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/pricing-and-eligibility.md): Learn how to disclose prices, fees, and requirements for Capital.
- [Notification and reporting to Adyen](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/reporting-to-adyen.md): Learn what situations to notify Adyen of and what reports to submit periodically.
- [User application and interface](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/user-interface.md): Learn about the compliance requirements for your user interface and application.
- [Vulnerable users (UK and Ireland only)](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/compliance-guidelines/vulnerable-users.md): Learn how to support potential users in vulnerable circumstances.
- [Manage consent](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/consent.md): Learn how to manege user consent with our dedicated API endpoints.
- [Create business accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/create-business-accounts.md): Create and manage business accounts for your users.
- [Get started](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/get-started.md): An overview of the steps from signing up to going live with business accounts.
- [How Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) works with Adyen's APIs](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/how-sca-works.md): Learn how to to perform SCA when making requests to Adyen's APIs.
- [Implement Strong Customer Authentication (SCA)](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/implement-sca.md): Learn how to manage Strong Customer Authentication (SCA) for business account users.
- [Install the Authentication SDK](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/install-auth-sdk.md): Learn how to install Adyen's Authentication SDK for iOS and Android devices.
- [Integration and go-live checklist](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/integration-checklist.md): Checklist for building and taking your Adyen for Platforms integration live with business accounts.
- [Verification codes](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/kyc-verification-codes.md): Verification errors and remediation codes in webhooks or API responses
- [General error codes](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/kyc-verification-codes/general-verification-errors.md)
- [Remediating action codes](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/kyc-verification-codes/remediating-actions.md)
- [Suberror codes](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/kyc-verification-codes/sub-errors.md)
- [Manage access for your team](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/manage-access.md): Learn how to manage your integration in your Customer Area.
- [Manage account holders](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/manage-account-holders.md): Learn how to manage account holders on your platform.
- [Manage balance accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/manage-balance-accounts.md): View and manage the balance accounts in your balance platform.
- [Manage legal entities](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/manage-legal-entities.md): Create, view, and manage your users' legal entity resources.
- [Manage devices registered for SCA](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/manage-sca-devices.md): View or deregister mobile devices used for Strong Customer Authentication (SCA).
- [Get account holder consent](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/oauth-flow.md): Learn how to get an access and refresh token.
- [Onboard and verify users](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/onboard-users.md): Learn to move your users through the onboarding and verification process.
- [Terms of Service](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/onboard-users/terms-of-service.md): Get your users to accept Adyen's Terms of Service
- [Open banking](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/open-banking.md): Learn how to integrate with the Adyen Open Banking platform.
- [Confirm funds availability](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/piisp.md): Learn how to consume our dedicated PIISP endpoints.
- [Initiate payments on behalf of account holders](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/pisp.md): Learn how to consume our dedicated PISP endpoints.
- [Receive funds from third parties](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/receive-funds.md): Learn how to receive funds from third parties using an Adyen business account.
- [Register a device for SCA](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/register-sca-devices.md): Learn how to use our Authentication SDK to register an iOS or Android device for SCA purposes.
- [SCA for funds transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/sca-for-funds-transfers.md): Learn how to use our Authentication SDK to authenticate your users when they make transfers.
- [SCA for transaction history](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/sca-for-transaction-history.md): Learn how to use our Authentication SDK to authenticate your users when they request their transaction history.
- [Send funds to third parties](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/send-funds.md): Learn how to send funds to third parties using an Adyen business account.
- [Account-to-account (A2A) payments with iDEAL](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/send-funds-ideal-integration.md): Learn how to integrate A2A payment flow through Adyen.
- [Approve or cancel transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/send-funds/approve-cancel-transfers.md): Allow members of your team to approve or cancel transfers before Adyen processes them.
- [Make a transfer request](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/send-funds/make-transfer-request.md): Learn how to send funds to third parties using an Adyen business account.
- [Transfer routes](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/send-funds/transfer-routes.md): Learn how to get the optimal routes for your payouts.
- [Verify counterparty name](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/send-funds/verify-counterparty.md): Learn how to verify the counterparty name registered to a third-party bank account for outgoing transfers.
- [Third-party transfer webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/third-party-transfer-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for transfers involving third-party bank accounts.
- [Use transaction rules](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/transaction-rules.md): Evaluate outgoing transfer requests from business accounts with predefined conditions and outcomes.
- [Create and manage rules](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/transaction-rules/create-and-manage.md): Use transaction rules to automatically approve or decline an outgoing transfer from business accounts.
- [Track transactions related to third-party transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/transactions.md): Use our API to get updates about transactions with third-party bank accounts.
- [Transaction webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/transactions/transaction-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for transfers involving third-party bank accounts.
- [Transfer funds internally](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/transfer-funds-internally.md): Initiate internal direct debits between your users' balance accounts.
- [Use transfer limits](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/use-transfer-limits.md): Evaluate outgoing transfer requests from business accounts with predefined conditions and outcomes.
- [Create and manage transfer limits for balance accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/use-transfer-limits/balance-accounts.md): Set a limit on outgoing transfers from your users' balance accounts.
- [Create and manage transfer limits for your balance platform](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/use-transfer-limits/balance-platform.md): Set a limit on outgoing transfers from your balance platform.
- [Verification process](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/verification-overview.md): Learn how Adyen verifies the users in your platform.
- [User capabilities](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/verification-overview/capabilities.md): Learn what capabilities your users can have in your platform
- [Periodic data reviews](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/verification-overview/data-review-process.md): Learn how Adyen may request your user to verify that their data is up-to-date.
- [Determine the verification requirements](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/verification-requirements.md): Learn what verification information you must collect from your users
- [Data formats per country/region](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/verification-requirements/data-formats-per-country.md): Find out the accepted identification, registration, and tax ID numbers for each supported country/region.
- [Requirements for document uploads](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/verification-requirements/document-requirements.md): Check the size, file format, and information required when uploading documents.
- [Reference for additional capabilities](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/verification-requirements/reference-additional-products.md): Learn what additional information is required to offer business accounts to your users.
- [Bank account verification with open banking](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/verify-account-holder.md): Quickly verify unregistered third-party individuals using the Adyen open banking gateway.
- [View transfer details for your business account](https://docs.adyen.com/business-accounts/view-transfers-details.md): View information about your transfers involving third parties.

## Capital
Offer business financing to users within your platform or marketplace.

- [Capital](https://docs.adyen.com/capital.md): Offer business financing to users within your platform or marketplace.
- [Account structure and resources](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/account-structure-resources.md): Understand the account structure you need for offering Capital to your users.
- [Integrate capital components](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/capital-components.md): Enable users to access business financing from Adyen using Platform Experience components.
- [Collect user data for higher financing amounts](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/collect-user-data.md): Learn how to collect additional KYC data from your user when they request more than EUR&nbsp;25,000 in combined business financing.
- [Compliance guidelines for Capital](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/compliance-guidelines.md): Learn how to remain compliant with financial regulations when offering Capital in your marketplace or platform.
- [Customer complaints and escalation](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/customer-complaints.md): Learn about types of customer complaints and proper complaint handling.
- [Customer service and support](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/customer-service-support.md): Learn about the compliance guidelines you need to follow when offering support to your users.
- [Download financing offers for eligible users](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/download-offers.md): Learn how to download a list of offers for all eligible users in your balance platform.
- [Registration as an intermediary in France](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/french-intermediary.md): To be allowed to offer Capital in France, register as an intermediary with ORIAS.
- [Get grant details](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-balances.md): Learn how to get information about all grants in your balance platform.
- [Get financing offers](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers.md): Get personalized financing offers that you can present to your users.
- [Dynamic financing offers](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/dynamic-offers.md): Learn how to get dynamic offers with flexible financing amounts and repayment terms.
- [Static financing offers](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-grant-offers/static-offers.md): Learn how to get static offers with fixed financing amounts and repayment terms.
- [Get started](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/get-started.md): An overview of the steps for signing up for Capital.
- [Grant lifecycle and status](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/grant-lifecycle-and-status.md): Learn how the grant status evolves throughout the grant lifecycle.
- [How Capital works](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/how-capital-works.md): Learn the basics about Adyen Capital.
- [Integration checklist](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/integration-checklist.md): An overview of the steps from signing up for Capital to going live.
- [Integration steps for capital components](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/integration-steps-components.md): A step-by-step guide for integrating Adyen's capital components.
- [Keeping records](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/keeping-records.md): Learn about the guidelines for keeping records regarding financial products.
- [Disburse a grant](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/make-grant-request.md): Learn how to make a request for a grant and disburse the funds to your user's account.
- [Manage access for your team](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/manage-access.md): Learn how to manage your integration in your Customer Area.
- [Manage disbursements](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/manage-disbursements.md): Learn how to get and update configurations of a disbursement.
- [Manage user capabilities](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/manage-user-capabilities.md): Learn about the capabilities your user must have to get business financing and how to manage them.
- [Material for marketing and communication with users](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/marketing-user-communication.md): Learn about the requirements and review process for your collateral material about your Capital offering.
- [Pricing and eligibility](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/pricing-and-eligibility.md): Learn how to disclose prices, fees, and requirements for Capital.
- [Release notes](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/release-notes.md)
- [Repayment](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/repayment.md): Learn how to make payments toward your user's business financing balance.
- [Notification and reporting to Adyen](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/reporting-to-adyen.md): Learn what situations to notify Adyen of and what reports to submit periodically.
- [Show the Terms of Service document](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/terms-of-service.md): Get your users to accept Adyen's Terms of Service
- [User application and interface](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/user-interface.md): Learn about the compliance requirements for your user interface and application.
- [Vulnerable users (UK and Ireland only)](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/vulnerable-users.md): Learn how to support potential users in vulnerable circumstances.
- [Webhook structures and types for Capital](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/webhook-types.md): Learn which webhooks Adyen sends for business financing-related events.
- [Grant lifecycle-related events](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/webhook-types/capital-webhooks.md): Learn which webhooks are sent for each event.
- [Fund transfer-related events](https://docs.adyen.com/capital/webhook-types/fund-transfers-webhooks.md): Learn which webhooks are sent for each event.

## Classic Platforms integration
Power your platform with onboarding, payment processing, and payouts.

- [Classic integration](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms.md): Power your platform with onboarding, payment processing, and payouts.
- [Account holders and accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/account-holders-and-accounts.md): Create account holders and accounts for sub-merchants that sign up on your platform.
- [Changing the legal entity type](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/account-holders-and-accounts/change-legal-entity.md): Modify the account holder's legal entity type to onboard them with the correct verification process.
- [Platforms account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/account-structure.md): Understand account structures to design a platform that suits your business needs.
- [Example structures](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/account-structure/example-structures.md): See applications of common platform account structures.
- [Platforms API Reference](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/api.md): Learn about Platforms APIs.
- [Configure notifications](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/configure-notifications.md): Learn how to set up and test notifications.
- [Signing notifications with HMAC](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/configure-notifications/signing-notifications-with-hmac.md): Add an extra layer of security to the notifications sent by Adyen for Platforms.
- [Error codes](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/error-codes.md): Learn about error codes and what they mean.
- [Fund transfer](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/fund-transfer.md): Transfer funds between accounts using Customer Area or the API.
- [Identify and mitigate account holder risk](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/identify-account-holder-risk.md): Spot potential malicious activities from account holders in your platform.
- [Configure notifications for risk signals](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/identify-account-holder-risk/configure-notifications-for-risk-signals.md): Learn how to set up and test notifications for risk signals in your platform.
- [Manage account holder risk](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/identify-account-holder-risk/review-and-manage.md): Review identities and risk scores of account holders in your platform.
- [KYC action required snapshot report](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/kyc-action-required-snapshot-report.md)
- [Notification types](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/notification-types.md): Learn about the notification types sent by Adyen for Platforms.
- [Onboard and verify users](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/onboard-users.md): Move your account holders through the verification process.
- [Custom onboarding](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/onboard-users/custom-onboarding.md): Onboard your account holders and move them through the verification process.
- [Hosted Onboarding Page](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/onboard-users/hosted-onboarding-page.md): Simplify your implementation with an Adyen-hosted onboarding page.
- [Customize the hosted onboarding experience](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/onboard-users/hosted-onboarding-page/customize-experience.md): Customize the users' experience on the Hosted Onboarding Page.
- [Customize HOP appearance](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/onboard-users/hosted-onboarding-page/hop-appearance.md): Customize your Hosted Onboarding Page to fit the look and feel of your own website.
- [Payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/payouts.md): Learn how to make scheduled or manual payouts to account holders.
- [Manual payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/payouts/manual-payout.md): Learn how to initiate one-off payouts to cards or bank accounts.
- [Payouts to cards](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/payouts/manual-payout/payout-to-cards.md): Learn how to save your account holder's card details and make a payout.
- [Payout notifications](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/payouts/payout-notifications.md)
- [Scheduled payouts to bank accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/payouts/scheduled-payout.md): Learn how to schedule payouts to account holders.
- [Tracking payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/payouts/track-payouts.md): Find out what you can do to check payouts.
- [Partner platform requirements](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/platforms-for-partners.md): Onboard sub-merchants and add online stores so that they can process ecommerce transactions.
- [Point of sale for platforms](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/platforms-for-pos.md): Process point-of-sale payments on behalf of your account holders.
- [Platforms integration and go live checklist](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/platforms-integration-checklist.md): Understand the core integration checks you can perform before you go live.
- [Prepare the reports](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/prepare-reports.md): Configure, download, and combine reports.
- [Processing online payments](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/processing-payments.md): Learn how to split transactions with your account holders.
- [Platforms quick start](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/quick-start.md): Start accepting payments and making payouts to your sub-merchants.
- [Common reconciliation processes](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/reconciliation-use-cases.md): Use reports to track and reconcile transactions for the accounts in your platform.
- [Build a transactional ledger](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/build-transactional-ledger.md): Track transactions for each account holder and account in your platform.
- [Reconcile accounts receivable](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-accounts-receivable.md): Reconcile the net amount settled to the accounts in your platform.
- [Track transactions in scheduled payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/transactions-scheduled-payouts.md): Track transactions that are part of scheduled payouts.
- [Reconcile fees](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/understand-fees.md): Reconcile fees debited from your platform's liable account.
- [Release notes](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/release-notes.md): Learn about the latest updates for Adyen for Platforms.
- [Reports and fee types](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/reports-and-fees.md): Learn about relevant report data and how you can use it to reconcile your platform accounts.
- [Marketpay Balance Report](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/reports-and-fees/marketpay-balance-report.md): This report shows balances in your Adyen for Platforms accounts.
- [Marketpay Payout Report](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/reports-and-fees/marketpay-payout-report.md): Use this report to reconcile each account holder's payout against debit and credit transactions.
- [Marketplace Payments accounting report](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/reports-and-fees/marketplace-payments-accounting-report.md): Use this report to view financial status changes, events, and modifications for payments settled in Adyen for Platforms.
- [Automatically split payments in stores](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/split-configuration-for-stores.md): Split payments automatically when processing through stores.
- [Providing tax forms](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/tax-forms.md): Learn how to provide a 1099-K tax form.
- [Test scenarios](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/test-scenarios.md): Test your integration.
- [Top up funds in accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/top-up-accounts.md): Let account holders add funds to their account by debiting directly from their bank account.
- [Verification process](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/verification-process.md): Learn about the verification process and what you need to do to enable payouts.
- [Accepted data formats](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/verification-process/accepted-data-format.md): Identify the IDs, bank codes, registration and tax ID numbers accepted in different countries.
- [Verification results](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/verification-process/check-verification-results.md): Keep track of the results of the verification and know when to retry.
- [Requirements for document uploads](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/verification-process/document-requirements.md): Check the size, file format, and other required information when uploading documents.
- [Legal arrangements check](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/verification-process/legal-arrangements.md): Include information about an account holder's legal arrangements.
- [Changes to verification requirements](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/verification-process/requirements-update.md): Learn about the updates in the verification requirements starting from August 1, 2022.
- [Verification codes](https://docs.adyen.com/classic-platforms/verification-process/verification-codes.md): Review the codes that Adyen sends to inform you of verification errors.

## Development resources
Learn what you need to build a successful integration with Adyen.

- [Development resources](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources.md): Learn what you need to build a successful integration with Adyen.
- [API authentication types](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/api-authentication.md): Learn how you can authenticate API requests that you make to Adyen.
- [API credentials](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/api-credentials.md): Generate and configure credentials for the API requests that you make to Adyen.
- [Roles](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/api-credentials/roles.md): Find out what roles your API credential needs to do an action.
- [API idempotency](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/api-idempotency.md): Learn how to safely resend API requests without performing the same operation multiple times.
- [Application information](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/application-information.md)
- [Batch processing](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/batch-processing.md): Create and upload an input file to process transactions in bulk.
- [Submit transaction batch files through SFTP](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/batch-processing/advanced-sftp-batch-files.md): Create input files for batch processing of transactions and upload the input file through SFTP.
- [Batch acknowledgement file](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/batch-processing/advanced-sftp-batch-files/batch-acknowledgement-file.md)

- [Documentation and knowledge tools](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/documentation-tools.md): Discover, access, and get updates to Adyen documentation using AI and programmatic tools.

- [Libraries](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/libraries.md)

- [Adyen Model Context Protocol (MCP) server](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/mcp-server.md): Integrate with our APIs using LLMs with our MCP server.
- [Import data from another payment provider](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/migrating-payment-data.md): Migrate your payments existing data to the Adyen payments platform.
- [Import data into referral lists](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/migrating-payment-data/import-data-into-referral-lists.md)

- [OAuth](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/oauth.md)
- [Response handling](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/overview-response-handling.md): Learn about how Adyen handles responses.
- [PaymentMethodVariant](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/paymentmethodvariant.md)
- [PCI DSS compliance guide](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide.md): Learn what you need to do to comply with PCI DSS v4.0.1.
- [PCI compliance levels](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide/merchant-levels.md): Know your current PCI level to determine the validation requirements for PCI DSS compliance.
- [Engaging a Qualified Security Assessor](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide/pci-with-qsa.md): Learn more about complying with PCI DSS with the help of a QSA.
- [Self-Assessment Questionnaire A eligibility](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide/saq-a-eligibility.md): Determine if you are eligible for SAQ A, and learn about changed PCI DSS script security requirements for SAQ A.
- [Script security for ecommerce](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide/script-security.md): Implement script security on your ecommerce payment page to comply with PCI DSS v4.0.1 requirements.
- [Vulnerability scanning for ecommerce](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/pci-dss-compliance-guide/vulnerability-scanning-regulation.md): Engage a scanning vendor as required under SAQ-A to identify potential vulnerabilities.
- [Raw responses](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/raw-acquirer-responses.md): Learn the meaning of raw acquirer responses.
- [Mapping to Visa system integrity fee categories](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/raw-acquirer-responses/visa-integrity-fees.md): For your retry logic, map raw responses to Visa fee categories related to excessive retries and data quality.
- [Refusal reasons](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/refusal-reasons.md): Learn about the reasons why a payment authorisation can be refused.
- [HTTP status codes](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/response-handling.md): Learn how to handle HTTP responses.
- [Security resources](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security.md): Keep your payment environment secure with our security resources.
- [API security](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security/api-security.md): Best practices for a secure use of APIs.
- [Identity and access management](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security/iam.md): Authentication best practices for a secure implementation.
- [Handling incidents](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security/incidents.md): Best practices for incident detection and response.
- [Protecting your Adyen integration](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security/integration-security.md): Best practices to mitigate security risks in your integration with Adyen.
- [Allowlisting IP addresses](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security/integration-security/allowlisting.md): Best practices to manage IP addresses.
- [Secure coding](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security/secure-coding.md): Enhance the security of your applications through secure development practices.
- [Protecting sensitive data](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security/sensitive-data.md): Protect sensitive information by implementing encryption good practices.
- [PGP encryption](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security/sensitive-data/pgp-encryption.md): Register your PGP key with Adyen.
- [Transport Layer Security (TLS)](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/security/sensitive-data/tls.md): Use the correct TLS configuration to protect data during transmission.
- [Surcharge compliance guide](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/surcharge-compliance.md): Comply with general and regional requirements for applying surcharges.
- [Test cards and credentials](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/test-cards-and-credentials.md): Use test credentials to test your integration.
- [Alternative payment methods test credentials](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/test-cards-and-credentials/alternative-payment-method-credentials.md): Test your integration with test credentials for other payment methods.
- [Create test cards](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/test-cards-and-credentials/create-test-cards.md): Create custom card numbers to test your integration with Adyen.
- [Test cards API reference](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/test-cards-and-credentials/create-test-cards/test-cards-api.md)
- [Test card numbers](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/test-cards-and-credentials/test-card-numbers.md): Use our test card numbers to test your integration.
- [Testing your online payments integration](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/testing.md): Troubleshoot issues with your online payment integration before it goes live.
- [Testing 3D Secure 2 authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/testing/3d-secure-2-authentication.md): Test 3D Secure 2 authentication with your integration and troubleshoot issues before it goes live.
- [Testing payments and modifications](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/testing/payments-and-modifications.md): Test payments and modifications with your integration and troubleshoot issues before it goes live.
- [Testing result codes and refusal reasons](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/testing/result-codes.md): Test getting result codes and refusal reasons with your integration and troubleshoot issues before going live.
- [Testing card CVC/CVV/CID result codes](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/testing/result-codes/cvc-cvv-cid-result-codes.md): Test getting card CVC/CVV/CID result codes with your integration and troubleshoot issues before it goes live.
- [Testing risk features](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/testing/risk-features.md): Test risk features with your integration and troubleshoot issues before it goes live.
- [Testing tokenization](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/testing/tokenization.md): Test the tokenization with your integration and troubleshoot issues before it goes live.
- [Versioning](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/versioning.md): Find out how Adyen applies versioning to APIs and server-side libraries.
- [Webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/webhooks.md): Receive important updates related to events.
- [Configure and manage webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/webhooks/configure-and-manage.md): Learn how to configure and manage subscriptions to Adyen webhooks.
- [Handle webhook events](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/webhooks/handle-webhook-events.md): Learn how to handle Adyen webhook events.
- [Secure webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/webhooks/secure-webhooks.md): Learn about best practices for securing your webhooks.
- [Verify HMAC signatures](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/webhooks/secure-webhooks/verify-hmac-signatures.md): Verify the integrity of webhook events using HMAC signatures.
- [Troubleshoot webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/webhooks/troubleshoot.md): Find, diagnose, and resolve webhook delivery failures using the tools in your Customer Area.
- [Webhook structure and types](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/webhooks/webhook-types.md): Learn which webhook types are sent for each event.
- [Account settings webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/webhooks/webhook-types/account-settings-webhooks.md): Receive status updates for your company and merchant accounts and stores.
- [Additional settings](https://docs.adyen.com/development-resources/webhooks/webhook-types/additional-settings.md): Receive additional shopper and transaction information in standard webhooks.

## Get started with Adyen
An overview of the steps to start accepting payments using Adyen.

- [Get started with Adyen](https://docs.adyen.com/get-started-with-adyen.md): An overview of the steps to start accepting payments using Adyen.

## Industries and markets
See what features and recommendations Adyen has to offer for your industry or market.

- [Industries and markets](https://docs.adyen.com/industries.md): See what features and recommendations Adyen has to offer for your industry or market.
- [Features per industry](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/feature-packs.md): See what features your Adyen integration needs for your industry.
- [Major sports event readiness](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/major-sports-event.md): Prepare your in-person payments for the influx of international visitors during major international soccer tournaments.
- [Markets](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/markets.md): Dive into overviews and discussions about specific markets.
- [Compliant payments in India](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/markets/india.md): Information you need to be aware of when operating in India.
- [Compliant payments in Japan](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/markets/japan.md): Information you need to be aware of when operating in Japan.
- [Credit Card Security Guidelines](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/markets/japan/credit-card-security-guidelines-compliance-guide.md): Learn about the Credit Card Security Guidelines 5.0 in Japan.
- [Compliance with the SCTA and PSA](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/markets/japan/scta-and-psa.md): Learn about how to comply with the SCTA and PSA when processing domestic payments in Japan.
- [特商法と資金決済法の遵守](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/markets/japan/scta-and-psa/japanese.md): 日本国内で取引を行う場合の特商法と資金決済法の遵守について.
- [Peak season readiness](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/peak-season.md): Learn what Adyen does and what you can do to be ready for the busiest period in the year.
- [Adyen for Platforms](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/peak-season/afp.md): Be aware of topics to address specifically on your platform or marketplace.
- [Adyen Giving](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/peak-season/giving.md): Let your customers donate to a nonprofit when they make a purchase.
- [In-person payments](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/peak-season/in-person-payments.md): Order hardware in time, and use the right software version and features.
- [Online payments](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/peak-season/online-payments.md): Use the right payment methods and check the health of your integration.
- [Refunds and payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/peak-season/refunds.md): Be ready for an increase in (omnichannel) refunds and desired changes in payout schedules.
- [Risk and disputes](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/peak-season/risk-and-disputes.md): Find out how to optimize your risk and dispute management setup for peak season.
- [Status updates and help](https://docs.adyen.com/industries/peak-season/status-and-help.md): Stay informed about the status of the Adyen payments platform, and know how to contact Support.

## Issuing
Create virtual and physical cards for your users.

- [Adyen Issuing](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing.md): Create virtual and physical cards for your users.
- [Enroll cards in 3D Secure](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/3d-secure.md): Learn how to enroll cards in 3D Secure to authenticate the cardholder during online transactions.
- [Using the out-of-band authentication SDK](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/3d-secure/oob-auth-sdk.md): Learn how to implement our SDK for out-of-band (OOB) authentication.
- [Authenticate cardholders using the Authentication SDK](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/3d-secure/oob-auth-sdk/authenticate-cardholders.md): Use our Authentication SDK for out-of-band authentication of payments made with Adyen-issued cards.
- [Install the Authentication SDK for mobile devices](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/3d-secure/oob-auth-sdk/install-sdk-mobile.md): Learn how to install Adyen's Authentication SDK for implementing out-of-band authentication.
- [Manage mobile devices registered for SCA](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/3d-secure/oob-auth-sdk/manage-devices.md): Learn how to manage devices registered for Strong Customer Authentication (SCA).
- [Register a mobile SCA device](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/3d-secure/oob-auth-sdk/register-devices.md): Use our Authentication SDK to register an iOS or Android device for out-of-band authentication of payments.
- [One-time password (OTP) authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/3d-secure/password-otp.md): Learn how to add the cardholder's mobile phone number, email address, and a password to support 3D Secure.
- [Troubleshooting failed payments](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/3d-secure/troubleshooting.md): Learn about the common reasons why payments that go through 3D Secure authentication might fail.
- [Account holder status](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/account-holder-status.md): Learn about how different status values affect your users.
- [Account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/account-structure-resources.md): Understand account structures to design an Issuing integration that suits your business needs.

- [Account structure for Enterprise issuing](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/account-structure-resources/issuing-enterprise.md): Understand the account structure that you need if you want to offer Adyen-issued cards.
- [Legal entity management](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/account-structure-resources/legal-entity-management.md): Understand legal entities, their importance in the verification process and place in your account structure.
- [Add and manage funds](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/add-manage-funds.md): Add and manage funds on balance accounts.
- [External bank transfer](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/add-manage-funds/external-bank-transfer.md): Fund balance accounts by sending a bank transfer from an external bank account.
- [Funds transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/add-manage-funds/funds-transfers.md): Transfer funds internally to balance accounts.
- [Process payments](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/add-manage-funds/process-payments.md): Learn how to acquire payments and use these payments to fund your Adyen-issued cards.
- [Make a payment](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/add-manage-funds/process-payments/make-a-payment.md): Learn how to process online and in-person payments in combination with your Issuing integration.
- [process payments label](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/authentication-label.md)
- [Payment authorisation](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/authorisation.md): Learn about the payment authorisation flow and how you can control payment approvals
- [Use relayed authorisation](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/authorisation/relayed-authorisation.md): Approve or decline payments by responding to relayed authorisation webhooks.
- [Use transaction rules](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/authorisation/transaction-rules.md): Evaluate transactions with predefined conditions and outcomes.
- [Create and manage rules](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/authorisation/transaction-rules/create-and-manage.md): Use transaction rules to automatically approve or decline a transaction.
- [Examples of transaction rules](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/authorisation/transaction-rules/examples.md): See examples of use cases and how they are defined as transaction rules.
- [Build user dashboards with UI components](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/build-user-dashboards.md): Use Platform Experience components to build interactive dashboards for your users.

- [Create cards](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/create-cards.md): Learn how to create and activate cards.
- [Generate and download Balance Platform Reports](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/generate-download-reports.md): Learn how to generate and get Balance Platform reports.

- [Manage balance accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/manage-balance-accounts.md): View and manage the balance accounts in your platform.
- [Manage card data](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/manage-card-data.md): Learn how to allow your cardholders to manage their primary account number (PAN) and personal identification number (PIN).

- [Reveal PIN using Adyen's iOS SDK](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/manage-card-data/reveal-pin-ios-sdk.md): Allow your cardholders see their personal identification number (PIN).

- [Manage legal entities](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/manage-legal-entities.md): View and manage your users' legal entity resources.
- [Manage liable balance accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/manage-liable-accounts.md): Understand and manage the different liable accounts in your balance platform.

- [Raise a dispute for fraudulent activities](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/raise-disputes/fraud.md): Learn how to raise a dispute for fraudulent activity, or when a card has been lost or stolen.
- [Manage disputes](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/raise-disputes/manage-disputes.md): Edit information about a dispute, and submit or close a raised dispute.

- [Validation types and refusal reasons](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/validation-checks.md): Learn about what kind of validations Adyen performs before authorising a transaction.

- [User capabilities](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/verification-overview/capabilities.md): Learn what capabilities your users can have in your platform

- [Requirements for document uploads](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/verification-requirements/document-requirements.md): Check the size, file format, and information required when uploading documents.

- [Webhooks for payment events](https://docs.adyen.com/issuing/webhook-types/payment-events.md): Use webhooks to keep track of payment stages.

## Marketplaces
Onboard users of your marketplace, process payments for them, and pay out their funds.

- [Marketplaces](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces.md): Onboard users of your marketplace, process payments for them, and pay out their funds.
- [Account holder status](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/account-holder-status.md): Learn about how different status values affect your users.
- [Account structure and resources](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/account-structure-resources.md): Understand account structures to design a marketplace that suits your business needs.
- [Account structure with financial products](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/account-structure-resources/financial-products.md): Understand how additional financial products can be connected to your platform account.
- [Legal entity management](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/account-structure-resources/legal-entity-management.md): Understand legal entities, their importance in the verification process and place in your account structure.
- [Marketplace account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/account-structure-resources/marketplace-structure.md): Understand your account structures to design a marketplace that suits your business needs.
- [Balance types](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/balance-types.md): Learn about the different balance types in your balance accounts.
- [Track balance updates](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/balance-updates.md): Learn about balance changes and how you can get notified about them.
- [Configure balance webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/balance-updates/configure-balance-webhook.md): Learn how you can configure and receive automatic notifications about the balance changes in your balance platform.
- [Manage your balance webhook settings](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/balance-updates/manage-balance-webhook.md): Learn how you can update or delete your balance webhook settings.
- [Example use cases](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/balance-updates/use-cases.md): See examples of how you can configure the balance webhook for specific use cases.
- [Build user dashboards with UI components](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/build-user-dashboards.md): Use Platform Experience components to build interactive dashboards for your users.
- [Business accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/business-accounts.md)
- [Capital](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/capital.md)
- [Issuing](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/card-issuing.md)
- [Cash out pending funds instantly](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/cash-out-instantly.md): Instantly make available your user's pending balance.
- [Make a cashout request](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/cash-out-instantly/cashout-request.md): Learn how to make a cashout request using Adyen's API.
- [Webhooks for cashouts](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/cash-out-instantly/cashout-webhooks.md): Learn about the webhooks that Adyen sends for events related to cashouts.
- [Checkout components](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/checkout-components.md): Use Adyen's prebuilt components to show a checkout page with various payment methods to your users.

- [EU depositor information sheet](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/eu-depositor-info-sheet.md): Information about deposit protection in the EU.
- [Foreign exchange fees](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/foreign-exchange-fees.md): Learn about foreign exchange fees.
- [Registration as an intermediary in France](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/french-intermediary.md): To be allowed to offer financial products to French users, register as an intermediary with ORIAS.
- [Keeping records](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/keeping-records.md): Learn about the guidelines for keeping records regarding financial products.
- [Material for marketing and communication with users](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/marketing-user-communication.md): Learn about the requirements and review process for your collateral material about financial product offerings.
- [Pricing and eligibility](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/pricing-and-eligibility.md): Learn how to disclose prices, fees, and requirements for financial products.
- [Notification and reporting to Adyen](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/reporting-to-adyen.md): Learn what situations to notify Adyen of and what reports to submit periodically.
- [User application and interface](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/user-interface.md): Learn about the compliance requirements for your user interface and application.
- [Additional user interface requirements for Capital](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/user-interface/capital-requirements.md): Learn about the additional compliance requirements for your user interface related to offering Capital.
- [Vulnerable users (UK and Ireland only)](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/compliance-financial-products/vulnerable-users.md): Learn how to support potential users in vulnerable circumstances.
- [Build your interface with UI component libraries](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/components-overview.md): Discover prebuilt UI component libraries that simplify your integration with Adyen and reduce your time to launch.
- [Currency conversion](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/currency-conversion.md): Learn how to convert the currency of a transaction.
- [Convert the currency of a payment](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/currency-conversion/payments.md): Learn how to convert the currency of a payment.
- [Fix the cost of goods in the processing currency](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/currency-conversion/payments/fix-processing-currency.md): Learn how to convert the currency of a payment when the cost of the goods is fixed in the processing currency
- [Fix the cost of goods in the settlement currency](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/currency-conversion/payments/fix-settlement-currency.md): Learn how to convert the currency of a payment when the cost of the goods is fixed in the settlement currency
- [Convert the currency of a refund](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/currency-conversion/refunds.md): Learn how to convert the currency of a refund.
- [Book the remainder to your platform](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/currency-conversion/refunds/your-platform.md): Learn how to convert the currency of a refund and book the remainder to your platform.
- [Book the remainder to your user](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/currency-conversion/refunds/your-user.md): Learn how to convert the currency of a refund and book the remainder to your user.
- [Custom payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/custom-payouts.md): Pay out your user's funds to their verified bank account using customized schedules and settlement logic.

- [Approve or cancel payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/custom-payouts/on-demand-payouts/approve-cancel-payouts.md): Allow members of your team to approve or cancel payouts before Adyen processes them.

- [Transfer routes](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/custom-payouts/transfer-routes.md): Learn how to get the optimal routes for your payouts.

- [Terms of Service](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/onboard-users/terms-of-service.md): Get your users to accept Adyen's Terms of Service
- [Payment methods](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/payment-methods.md): Learn how which payment methods we support for your integration.
- [Add payment methods](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/payment-methods/add-payment-methods.md): Learn how to add payment methods to your merchant account.
- [Manage payment methods](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/payment-methods/manage-payment-methods.md): Learn how to manage the payment methods your users can accept.
- [Manage payment methods through API](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/payment-methods/manage-payment-methods/api.md): Learn how to manage your payment methods for your marketplace using the Management API.
- [Manage payment methods in your Customer Area](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/payment-methods/manage-payment-methods/customer-area.md): Learn how to manage your payment methods in your marketplace using the Customer Area.
- [Calculating the payout amount](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/payout-amount.md): Learn how Adyen calculates the amount that you can be paid out using using managed or custom payout schedules.
- [Payout descriptions](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/payout-descriptions.md): Learn how you can customize payout descriptions that appear on your users' bank statements.
- [Payout reconciliation](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/payout-reconciliation.md): Learn how to reconcile payouts and choose the right report or webhook for your business needs.
- [Payout transfer webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/payout-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for payout-related events.
- [Prepare the reports](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/prepare-reports.md): Configure, download, and combine reports.
- [Get platform reports](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/prepare-reports/generate-download-reports.md): Learn how to generate and download reports for your balance platform automatically or manually.
- [Process payments](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/process-payments.md): Learn how to enable your users to accept payments, and how split them between balance account in your platform.
- [Common reconciliation processes](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reconciliation-use-cases.md): Use reports to track and reconcile transactions for the accounts in your balance platform.
- [First year operational tasks](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reconciliation-use-cases/first-year-focus.md): An overview of the key reporting use cases for reconciliation to prioritize in your first year of operation.
- [Marketplace-level reporting](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reconciliation-use-cases/first-year-focus/platform-level-reporting.md): An overview of the key reporting use cases to prioritize for your business.
- [User-level reporting](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reconciliation-use-cases/first-year-focus/platform-user-level-reporting.md): An overview of the key reporting use cases to prioritize for your marketplace's users.
- [Liable account summary](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reconciliation-use-cases/liable-account-summary.md): View the starting and ending balances of your liable account for a chosen time frame.
- [Reconcile fees](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-fees.md): Track and reconcile fees in your balance platform.
- [Reconcile payments](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-payments.md): Reconcile the funds from payment processing to the accounts in your balance platform.
- [Reconcile fund transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-transfers.md): Track payouts (bank transfers) and internal transfers in your balance platform.
- [Verify balances](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reconciliation-use-cases/verify-balances.md): Spot-check account balance positions across your balance platform.
- [Release notes](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/release-notes.md)
- [Reports and fee types](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reports-and-fees.md): Learn about relevant report data and how you can use it to reconcile your balance platform accounts.
- [Balance Platform Accounting Report](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reports-and-fees/balance-platform-accounting-report.md): Get an overview of all financial activities on your balance platform.
- [Balance Platform Balance Report](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reports-and-fees/balance-report.md): Get an overview of the balances across your balance platform.
- [Balance Platform Fee report](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reports-and-fees/fee-report.md): Get an overview of monthly fees charged to your balance platform users.
- [Balance Platform Payout report](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reports-and-fees/payout-report.md): Get an overview of daily, weekly, or monthly payouts to your balance platform users.
- [Balance Platform Statement report](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/reports-and-fees/statement-report.md): Get the starting and ending balance, and the balance changes throughout the day.
- [Settle funds](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/settle-funds.md): Learn how and when funds are made available for you and your users.
- [Configure sales day closing time](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/settle-funds/configure-closing-time.md): Learn how you can configure the closing time for a sales day.
- [Pass-through settlement](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/settle-funds/pass-through-settlement.md): Learn how the pass-through settlement works.
- [Split transactions between balance accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/split-transactions.md): Learn how to split transactions between balance accounts in your marketplace.
- [Split chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/split-transactions/split-chargebacks.md): Learn how to handle the disputed amount during a chargeback.
- [Split payments at authorization](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/split-transactions/split-payments-at-authorization.md): Learn how to split a transaction at the time of payment.
- [Split payments at capture](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/split-transactions/split-payments-at-capture.md): Learn how to split a transaction at the time of capture.
- [Split refunds](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/split-transactions/split-refunds.md): Learn how to split the funds in a refund.
- [Surcharge](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/surcharge.md): Enable your users to pass on payment acceptance fees to their customers as a surcharge to their payments.
- [Test verification/KYC scenarios](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/test-verification-errors.md): Learn how you can test your error handling flows.
- [Top up balance accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/top-up-balance-account.md): Set up a pull sweep to trigger a direct debit from a verified transfer instrument.
- [Top up on demand](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/top-up-balance-account/on-demand-top-ups.md): Make payment requests to top up balance accounts on demand.
- [Top up on a schedule](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/top-up-balance-account/scheduled-top-ups.md): Set up a pull sweep to trigger a direct debit from a verified transfer instrument.
- [Webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/top-up-balance-account/top-up-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for events related to top-ups.
- [Transaction fees](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/transaction-fees.md): Learn how to handle the fees incurred on a payment.
- [Track transactions](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/transfer-transactions.md): Use our API and webhooks to get updates about transactions in your balance platform.
- [Track transactions with API requests](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/transfer-transactions/track-api.md): Use the Transfers API to query transactions in your marketplace.
- [Track transactions with webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/transfer-transactions/track-webhooks.md): Use transaction webhooks to get real-time updates about fund movements in your marketplace.
- [Provide tax forms (US only)](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/us-tax-forms.md): Provide a 1099-K or 1099-NEC tax form to your users.
- [Register consent for paperless delivery of tax forms (US only)](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/us-tax-forms-edelivery-consent.md): Check and register user-consent preferences for electronic delivery of US tax forms.
- [Verification process](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/verification-overview.md): Learn how Adyen verifies the users in your platform.
- [User capabilities](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/verification-overview/capabilities.md): Learn what capabilities your users can have in your marketplace
- [Periodic data reviews](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/verification-overview/data-review-process.md): Learn how Adyen may request your user to verify that their data is up-to-date.
- [Verification types](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/verification-overview/verification-types.md): Collect verification information from your users upfront or in a staggered process.
- [Determine the verification requirements](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/verification-requirements.md): Learn what verification information you must collect from your users
- [Data formats per country/region](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/verification-requirements/data-formats-per-country.md): Find out the accepted identification, registration, and tax ID numbers for each supported country/region.
- [Requirements for document uploads](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/verification-requirements/document-requirements.md): Check the size, file format, and information required when uploading documents.
- [Reference for additional capabilities](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/verification-requirements/reference-additional-products.md): Learn what additional information is required to offer financial products to your users, such as business accounts.
- [View payout transfer details](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/view-payout-transfers-details.md): View information about the payout-related transfers occurring in your marketplace.
- [View transfer details](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/view-transfers-details.md): View information about the transfers occurring in your marketplace.
- [Webhook structures and types for marketplaces](https://docs.adyen.com/marketplaces/webhook-types.md): Learn which webhook types are sent for each event.
