## Online payments
Accept payments with cards, wallets, and local payment methods on your website and mobile app.

- [Online payments](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments.md): Accept payments with cards, wallets, and local payment methods on your website and mobile app.
- [3D Secure 2 authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure.md): Integrate 3D Secure 2 authentication.
- [3D Secure for regulation compliance](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure-for-regulation-compliance.md): Learn what you need to do to stay compliant with authentication regulations and to retain maximum conversion for your online card payment transactions.
- [3D Secure 2 API reference](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/api-reference.md): Learn about parameters that you can use in your 3D Secure 2 request.
- [Third-party authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/authorize-mpidata.md): Use authentication data from third-party to authorize payments.
- [Data-only flow](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/data-only.md): Implement 3D Secure 2 to only share data with Visa or Mastercard instead of sending an authentication request.
- [Native 3D Secure 2 authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/native-3ds2.md): Support 3D Secure 2 natively on your website or mobile app.
- [3D Secure 2 redirect authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2.md): Learn how to support 3D Secure with a redirect page.
- [Redirect 3D Secure for Android](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/android.md): Support 3D Secure authentication through a redirect in your Android app.
- [Redirect 3DS Components integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/android-component.md): Support cards with 3D Secure authentication through a redirect in your Android app.
- [Redirect 3DS Components integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/android-component/earlier-versions.md): Support cards with 3D Secure authentication through a redirect in your Android app.
- [Redirect 3DS Drop-in integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/android-drop-in.md): Support cards with 3D Secure authentication through a redirect in your Android app.
- [Redirect 3D Secure for iOS](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/ios.md): Support 3D Secure authentication through a redirect in your iOS app.
- [Redirect 3DS Components integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/ios-component.md): Support cards with 3D Secure authentication through a redirect in your iOS app
- [Redirect 3DS2 Drop-in integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/ios-drop-in.md): Support cards with 3D Secure authentication through a redirect in your iOS app.
- [Redirect 3D Secure for Web](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/web.md): Support cards with 3D Secure authentication through a redirect on your website.
- [Redirect 3D Secure Component integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/web-component.md): Add 3D Secure authentication with a redirect to your integration.
- [Redirect 3DS Drop-in integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/redirect-3ds2/web-drop-in.md): Support cards with 3D Secure authentication through a redirect on your website.
- [Standalone authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/3d-secure/standalone-authentication.md): Perform the 3D Secure 2 authentication with Adyen and submit the payment authorization later.
- [Accessibility](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/accessibility.md): Find out how Drop-in and Components optimize accessibility for your shoppers.
- [Account Updater](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/account-updater.md): Get updated card information with our Account Updater services.
- [Batch Account Updater](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/account-updater/batch-account-updater.md): Learn how you can update card information through the Batch Account Updater.
- [Real Time Account Updater](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/account-updater/real-time-account-updater.md)
- [Authorization adjustment](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/adjust-authorisation.md): Learn the differences between pre-authorization and final authorization, asynchronous and synchronous adjustment, and when authorization adjustment is available.
- [Adjust an authorization](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/adjust-authorisation/adjust-with-preauth.md): Pre-authorize a payment, adjust the authorized amount, and capture the payment.
- [Analytics and data tracking](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/analytics-and-data-tracking.md): Find out what usage data Adyen collects for Drop-in and Components.
- [AusPayNet compliance guide](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/auspaynet-compliance-guide.md)
- [Auto Rescue](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/auto-rescue.md): Automatically retry shopper-not-present transactions when they are refused.
- [Auto Rescue for card payments](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/auto-rescue/cards.md): Automatically retry shopper-not-present card transactions when they are refused.
- [Auto Rescue for SEPA payments](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/auto-rescue/sepa.md): Automatically retry shopper-not-present direct debit transactions when they are refused.
- [Build your integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/build-your-integration.md): Start building your server-side integration
- [Advanced flow integration guide](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/build-your-integration/advanced-flow.md): Accept payments using the Advanced flow.
- [Result codes](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/build-your-integration/payment-result-codes.md): Use result codes to understand the current state of a payment.
- [Sessions flow integration guide](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/build-your-integration/sessions-flow.md): Start accepting payments on your website or app.
- [Cancel](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/cancel.md): Learn to cancel a payment that has not been captured.
- [Capture](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/capture.md): Capture an authorized payment.
- [CAPTURE_FAILED and REFUND_FAILED reasons](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/capture/failure-reasons.md): Learn why captures and refunds can fail, and what you need to do to fix them.
- [Card encryption with JWE](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/card-encryption-with-jwe.md): Use JWE to encrypt card details for your custom card integration.
- [Configure the checkout experience](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/checkout-settings.md): Learn how to optimize the checkout experience for shoppers using checkout settings such as dynamic payment method ordering.
- [Classic integrations for Ecommerce](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations.md)
- [Classic API integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration.md)
- [3D Secure authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication.md): Explore your 3D Secure authentication options.
- [3D Secure 1 and 2 redirect authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/3d-secure-1.md): Learn how you can support both versions of 3D Secure through a redirect page with your classic API integration.
- [Authentication-only integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/3d-secure-1/3d-secure-1-authentication-only.md): Learn how you can integrate with Adyen as a standalone 3D Secure provider.
- [Custom 3D Secure implementation](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/3d-secure-1/custom-3d-secure-implementation.md)
- [Custom 3D Secure using a hosted MPI](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/3d-secure-1/custom-3d-secure-implementation/custom-3d-secure-using-a-hosted-mpi.md)
- [Custom 3D Secure using an external MPI](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/3d-secure-1/custom-3d-secure-implementation/custom-3d-secure-using-an-external-mpi.md)
- [Native 3D Secure 2 authentication](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/native-3ds2.md): Learn how you can natively support 3D Secure 2 in your site or app with your classic API integration.
- [Android 3D Secure 2 SDK](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/native-3ds2/android-sdk-integration.md): Support 3D Secure 2 authentication on your Android app.
- [API reference](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/native-3ds2/api-reference-3d-secure-2.md): Learn about parameters that you can use in your 3D Secure request.
- [Authentication-only integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/native-3ds2/authentication-only-integration.md): Use Adyen as a standalone 3D Secure 2 provider. Perform only the 3D Secure 2 authentication with us and submit the payment authorisation later.
- [Browser-based integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/native-3ds2/browser-based-integration.md): Support 3D Secure 2 authentication on your website using your existing classic API integration.
- [Helper functions](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/native-3ds2/browser-based-integration/3d-secure-2-helper-functions.md): Simplify your 3D Secure 2 implementation web implementation with our helper functions.
- [iOS 3D Secure 2 SDK](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/native-3ds2/ios-sdk-integration.md): Support 3D Secure 2 authentication on your iOS app.
- [Other 3D Secure flows](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/other-3ds-flows.md): Learn how you can implement alternative 3D Secure flows.
- [Authorise a payment with 3D Secure 2 authenticated data](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/other-3ds-flows/authorize-mpidata.md): Submit a payment authorisation with Adyen, using authentication data from a third-party 3D Secure 2 provider.
- [Data-only flow](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/classic-api-integration/3d-secure-authentication/other-3ds-flows/data-only.md): Implement 3D Secure 2 without sending an authentication request to the issuer.

- [Pre-authorisation and authorisation adjustment](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/modify-payments/adjust-authorisation.md): Pre-authorise a payment, adjust the authorised amount, and capture the payment.
- [Cancel](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/modify-payments/cancel.md): Cancel the authorisation on an uncaptured payment.
- [Cancel or refund](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/modify-payments/cancel-or-refund.md): Return the funds to the shopper when you are not sure whether the payment has been captured.
- [Capture](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/modify-payments/capture.md): Complete an authorised payment.
- [Failed captures and refunds](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/classic-integrations/modify-payments/capture/failure-reasons.md): Learn why captures and refunds can fail, and what you need to do to fix them.

- [Network tokenization](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/network-tokenization.md): Use network tokens to process payments with Adyen for better authorization rates.
- [Online payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/online-payouts.md): Send funds to your suppliers, partners, or customers.
- [Instant card payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/online-payouts/instant-payouts.md): Learn how to make payouts to cards.

- [Payout to a bank account](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/online-payouts/payouts-to-a-bank-account.md)
- [Payouts in stages](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/online-payouts/payouts-to-bank-accounts-and-wallets.md): Learn how to make payouts in stages to bank accounts or wallets.
- [Out-of-app payments on iOS](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/out-of-app-payments-on-ios.md): Redirect your users to a website to complete payments for their in-app purchases.
- [Partial authorizations](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/partial-authorizations.md): Allow partial authorizations to reduce declined transactions due to insufficient funds.
- [Partial payments](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/partial-payments.md): Let your shoppers make a purchase with multiple payment methods.
- [Payment methods](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/payment-methods.md)
- [Payments India compliance guide](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/payments-india-compliance-guide.md): When processing payments in India, you must make sure your workflows comply with RBI regulations.
- [India go-live checklist](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/payments-india-compliance-guide/go-live-india.md): Follow this checklist before you start accepting live payments in India.
- [PCI DSS compliance](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/pci-dss-compliance.md): Learn what you need to do to comply with PCI DSS v4.0.1.
- [PSD2 SCA compliance guide](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/psd2-sca-compliance-and-implementation-guide.md): Learn about the Revised Payment Services Directive for strong customer authentication.
- [Implement SCA compliance](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/psd2-sca-compliance-and-implementation-guide/sca-options.md): Learn how to implement required PSD2 SCA compliance for your transactions.
- [Refund](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/refund.md): Refund a payment back to the shopper.
- [Release notes](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/release-notes.md): Learn about the latest updates to our API, and Drop-in/Components for web, iOS, and Android.
- [Reversal](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/reversal.md): Return the funds to the shopper when you are not sure whether the payment has been captured.
- [Surcharge](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/surcharge.md): Pass on payment acceptance fees to your customers as a surcharge to their payments.
- [Tokenization](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/tokenization.md): Store payment details for recurring payments with our Tokenization feature.
- [Create tokens](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/tokenization/create-tokens.md): Learn how to create tokens with your online payments integration.
- [Forward payment details](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/tokenization/forward-payment-details.md): Forward stored payment details to use them with different payment service providers.
- [Make token payments](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/tokenization/make-token-payments.md): Learn how to make a payment with a token you created with your online payments integration.
- [Manage tokens](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/tokenization/managing-tokens.md): Learn how to manage tokens you stored with Adyen.
- [Two-step checkout](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/two-step-checkout.md): Add a payment review page in your checkout flow.
- [Upgrade your integration](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/upgrade-your-integration.md): Keep your integration up-to-date with the latest versions.
- [Migrate to Checkout API](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/upgrade-your-integration/migrate-to-checkout-api.md): Migrate your Classic API integration to Checkout API.
- [Upgrade to Adyen Android v5](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/upgrade-your-integration/upgrade-to-android-5-0-0.md): Find out more about the breaking changes in this release.
- [Upgrade to Checkout API v72](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/upgrade-your-integration/upgrade-to-checkout-api-v72.md): Find what you must do to upgrade to Checkout API v72.
- [Upgrade to Adyen iOS v5](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/upgrade-your-integration/upgrade-to-ios-5-0-0.md): Find out more about the major changes in this release.
- [Upgrade to Adyen Web v6](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/upgrade-your-integration/upgrade-to-web-v6.md): Make the changes required to upgrade from Web Drop-in/Components v5.x.x to v6.x.x.
- [Upgrade to Adyen Web v6](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/upgrade-your-integration/upgrade-to-web-v6/from-v3.md): Make the changes required to upgrade from Web Drop-in/Components v3.x.x to v6.x.x.
- [Upgrade to Adyen Web v6](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/upgrade-your-integration/upgrade-to-web-v6/from-v4.md): Make the changes required to upgrade from Web Drop-in/Components v4.x.x to v6.x.x.
- [Best practices for web integrations](https://docs.adyen.com/online-payments/web-best-practices.md): Follow these best practices to get the most out of your integration

## Partners
Become an Adyen partner.

- [Partners](https://docs.adyen.com/partners.md): Become an Adyen partner.
- [Application information](https://docs.adyen.com/partners/application-information.md): Technology partners working with Adyen are required to add application info fields to API requests.
- [Features per industry](https://docs.adyen.com/partners/industries.md)
- [Integration checklist](https://docs.adyen.com/partners/integration-checklist.md): Learn about the steps required to build a partner integration with Adyen.
- [OAuth](https://docs.adyen.com/partners/oauth.md): Securely authorize API requests on behalf of your customers
- [Installed OAuth apps](https://docs.adyen.com/partners/oauth/installed-oauth-apps.md): Manage your installed OAuth apps.
- [OAuth integration guide](https://docs.adyen.com/partners/oauth/integration.md): Integrate with our OAuth service to make API requests on your customer's behalf
- [OAuth scopes](https://docs.adyen.com/partners/oauth/scopes.md): Limit your application's access to your customer's resources.

## Payment methods
An overview of the payment methods that you can add to your online payments integration.

- [Payment methods](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods.md): An overview of the payment methods that you can add to your online payments integration.
- [ACH Direct Debit](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit.md): Accept ACH Direct Debit payments with your online payments integration.
- [ACH Direct Debit for Android](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/android.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your Android app.
- [Android Component](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/android-component.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your Components integration.
- [Android Drop-in](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/android-drop-in.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your Drop-in integration.
- [ACH Direct Debit for API only](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/api-only.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your API-only integration.
- [ACH Direct Debit Flutter Drop-in](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/flutter-drop-in.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your Drop-in integration.
- [ACH Direct Debit for iOS](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/ios.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your iOS app.
- [ACH Direct Debit iOS Component](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/ios-component.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your Components integration.
- [ACH Direct Debit iOS Drop-in](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/ios-drop-in.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your Drop-in integration.
- [Account validation with giact](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/verification-with-giact.md): Use giact gVERIFY for account validation of ACH Direct Debit payments.
- [ACH Direct Debit for Web](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/web.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your Web integration.
- [Web Component](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/web-component.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your Components integration.
- [Web Drop-in](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/ach-direct-debit/web-drop-in.md): Add ACH Direct Debit to your Drop-in integration.
- [Manage payment methods in your account](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/add-payment-methods.md): Learn how to add and manage payment methods in your merchant account.
- [Affirm](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/affirm.md): Accept Affirm payments in Canada, the UK, and the US.
- [Affirm for API only](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/affirm/api-only.md): Add Affirm to an existing API-only integration.
- [Affirm for iOS](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/affirm/ios.md): Add Affirm to your iOS app.
- [Affirm iOS Component integration](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/affirm/ios-component.md): Add Affirm to your existing iOS Components integration.
- [Affirm Drop-in integration](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/affirm/ios-drop-in.md): Add Affirm to an existing iOS Drop-in integration.
- [Affirm for Web](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/affirm/web.md): Accept Affirm payments on your website.
- [Affirm Component](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/affirm/web-component.md): Add Affirm to an existing Components integration.
- [Affirm Drop-in integration](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/affirm/web-drop-in.md): Add Affirm to an existing Drop-in integration.
- [Afterpay](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/afterpaytouch.md): Learn how to accept Afterpay payments in Australia, Canada, and New Zealand.
- [Afterpay for Android](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/afterpaytouch/android.md): Add Afterpay to your Android app.

- [Afterpay Drop-in integration](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/afterpaytouch/android-drop-in.md): Add Afterpay to an existing Drop-in integration.

- [Afterpay for iOS](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/afterpaytouch/ios.md): Add Afterpay to your iOS app.
- [Afterpay Redirect Component](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/afterpaytouch/ios-component.md): Use the Redirect Component to handle the redirect to Afterpay.
- [Afterpay Drop-in integration](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/afterpaytouch/ios-drop-in.md): Add Afterpay to anexisting iOS Drop-in integration.
- [Afterpay for Web](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/afterpaytouch/web.md): Accept Afterpay payments on your website.
- [Afterpay Component](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/afterpaytouch/web-component.md): Add Afterpay to your existing Components integration.
- [Afterpay Drop-in integration](https://docs.adyen.com/payment-methods/afterpaytouch/web-drop-in.md): Add Afterpay to your existing Drop-in integration.

## Payouts
Learn how to send global payouts in real time.

- [Adyen Payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts.md): Learn how to send global payouts in real time.
- [Payouts and Payments](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service.md): Combine payment processing with Adyen’s payouts service.
- [Account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/account-structure-resources.md): Understand the account structure required to use payouts with payments.
- [Enterprise accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/enterprise-accounts.md): Learn how to use enterprise accounts to manage your cash flow.
- [Account statements for enterprise accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/enterprise-accounts/account-statements.md): Automate reconciliation and provide your users with transaction reports.
- [Get started](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/get-started.md): An overview of the steps from signing up for Adyen payouts to going live.
- [Getting paid](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/getting-paid.md): Learn how to send the funds from payments processed with Adyen to your bank account.
- [Initiate on-demand payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/getting-paid/on-demand-payouts.md): Initiate an on-demand payout to your verified bank account.
- [Calculating the payout amount](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/getting-paid/payout-amount.md): Learn how Adyen calculates the amount that you can pay out.
- [Payout webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/getting-paid/payout-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for payout-related events.
- [Configure custom payout schedules](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/getting-paid/scheduled-payouts.md): Set up scheduled automatic payouts to your verified bank account.
- [Transfer routes](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/getting-paid/transfer-routes.md): Learn how to get the optimal routes for your payouts.
- [Transfer statement description](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/getting-paid/transfer-statement.md): Learn about .
- [Integration and go-live checklist](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/integration-checklist.md): Checklist for building and taking your Adyen payouts integration live.
- [Transfer funds internally](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/internal-fund-transfers.md): Manage funds within your balance platform.
- [Webhooks for internal transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/internal-fund-transfers/internal-transfer-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for internal funds transfers.
- [Initiate on-demand internal funds transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/internal-fund-transfers/on-demand-fund-transfers.md): Send funds or initiate an internal direct debit between balance accounts.
- [Return transferred funds](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/internal-fund-transfers/return-transfers.md): Return funds to the sender of the original internal transfer, without creating a new transfer.
- [Schedule internal funds transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/internal-fund-transfers/scheduled-fund-transfers.md): Create a schedule to automatically transfer funds between balance accounts.
- [Manage access for your team](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/manage-access.md): Learn how to manage your integration in your account using the Customer Area.
- [API credentials for your balance platform](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/manage-access/api-credentials-web-service.md): Generate and configure credentials for API requests related to the balance platform
- [Roles for API credentials](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/manage-access/webservice-roles.md): Learn what roles your API credential needs to perform an action
- [Pay out to bank accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-bank-accounts.md): Pay out your funds to a third-party bank account.
- [Approve or cancel payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-bank-accounts/approve-cancel-payouts.md): Allow members of your team to approve or cancel payouts before Adyen processes them.
- [Make a payout to a third-party bank account](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-bank-accounts/bank-payout-request.md): Make an API request to pay out funds to a third-party bank account.
- [Manage bank account details](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-bank-accounts/manage-bank-details.md): Learn how to securely process the details of third-party bank accounts.
- [Webhooks for payouts to bank accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-bank-accounts/payout-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for payout-related events.
- [Transfer routes](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-bank-accounts/transfer-routes.md): Learn how to get the optimal routes for external fund transfers.
- [Verify counterparty name](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-bank-accounts/verify-counterparty.md): Learn how to verify the counterparty name registered to a third-party bank account for outgoing transfers.
- [Pay out to third-party cards](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-cards.md): Pay out your funds from your balance account to a third-party card.
- [Make a payout to a third-party card](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-cards/funds-disbursement.md): Make an API request to pay out funds to a third-party card.
- [Manage card details](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-cards/manage-card-details.md): Learn how to securely process the details of third-party cards.
- [Webhooks for card payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-cards/payout-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for payout-related events.
- [Reconciliation of payouts to cards](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/pay-out-to-cards/reconciliation.md): How to perform reconciliation of payouts to cards.
- [Payout lifecycle](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/payout-lifecycle.md): Learn about payout statuses and how you can track them.
- [Prepare the reports](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/prepare-reports.md): Configure and download reports.
- [Get platform reports](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/prepare-reports/generate-download-reports.md): Learn how to generate and download reports for your balance platform automatically or manually.
- [Common reconciliation processes](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/reconciliation-use-cases.md): Use reports to track and reconcile payout transactions for the accounts in your balance platform.
- [Reconcile fees](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-fees.md): Reconcile invoice fees with the underlying transactions.
- [Reconcile pay ins](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-pay-ins.md): Reconcile pay in and top-up transfers to your Balance Platform.
- [Reconcile fund transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-transfers.md): Track payouts (bank transfers) and internal transfers in your payout account.
- [Verify balances](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/reconciliation-use-cases/verify-balances.md): Spot-check account balance positions across your balance platform.
- [Reports and fees](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/reports-and-fees.md): Learn about relevant report data and how you can use it to reconcile enterprise payouts in your account.
- [Balance Platform Accounting Report](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/reports-and-fees/balance-platform-accounting-report.md): Get an overview of all financial activities on your payout account.
- [Balance Platform Statement report](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/reports-and-fees/statement-report.md): Get the starting and ending balance, and the balance changes throughout the day.
- [Use transaction rules](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/transaction-rules.md): Evaluate transactions with predefined conditions and outcomes.
- [Create and manage rules](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/transaction-rules/create-and-manage.md): Use transaction rules to automatically approve or decline an outgoing transfer from balance accounts.
- [Track transactions](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/transfer-transactions.md): Use our API to get updates about transactions resulting from payouts.
- [Transaction webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/transfer-transactions/transaction-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for transfers involving third-party bank accounts.
- [View transfer details](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/view-transfers-details.md): View information about the transfers occurring in your platform.
- [Webhook structure and types for payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/payout-service/webhook-types.md): Learn which webhook types are sent for each event.
- [Payouts and Adyen for Platforms](https://docs.adyen.com/payouts/platform-payouts.md)

## Platforms
Onboard users of your platform, process payments for them, and pay out their funds.

- [Platforms](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms.md): Onboard users of your platform, process payments for them, and pay out their funds.
- [Account holder status](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/account-holder-status.md): Learn about how different status values affect your users.
- [Account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/account-structure-resources.md): Understand account structures to design a platform that suits your business needs.
- [Account structure with financial products](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/account-structure-resources/financial-products.md): Understand how additional financial products can be connected to your platform account.
- [Legal entity management](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/account-structure-resources/legal-entity-management.md): Understand legal entities, their importance in the verification process and place in your account structure.
- [Platform account structure](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/account-structure-resources/platform-structure.md): Understand your account structure to design a platform that suits your business needs.
- [Split payments automatically](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/automatic-split-configuration.md): Split payments automatically when processing through stores.
- [Create split configuration profiles](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/automatic-split-configuration/create-split-configuration.md): Create a split configuration profile for all payments processed through your user's store.
- [Manage split configuration profiles](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/automatic-split-configuration/manage-split-configurations.md): Learn how you can view, change, and delete the conditions and instructions in split configuration profiles.
- [Manage split configuration profiles](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/automatic-split-configuration/manage-split-configurations/api.md): Learn how you can view, change, and delete the conditions and instructions in split configuration profiles.
- [Manage split configuration profiles in your Customer Area](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/automatic-split-configuration/manage-split-configurations/customer-area.md): Learn how you can view, change, and delete the conditions and instructions in split configuration profiles in your Customer Area.
- [Balance types](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/balance-types.md): Learn about the different balance types in your balance accounts.
- [Track balance updates](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/balance-updates.md): Learn about balance changes and how you can get notified about them.
- [Configure balance webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/balance-updates/configure-balance-webhook.md): Learn how you can configure and receive automatic notifications about the balance changes in your balance platform.
- [Manage your balance webhook settings](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/balance-updates/manage-balance-webhook.md): Learn how you can update or delete your balance webhook settings.
- [Example use cases](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/balance-updates/use-cases.md): See examples of how you can configure the balance webhook for specific use cases.
- [Build user dashboards with UI components](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/build-user-dashboards.md): Use Platform Experience components to build interactive dashboards for your users.
- [Business accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/business-accounts.md)
- [Capital](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/capital.md)
- [Issuing](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/card-issuing.md)

- [Webhooks for cashouts](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/cash-out-instantly/cashout-webhooks.md): Learn about the webhooks that Adyen sends for events related to cashouts.
- [Compliance guidelines for financial products](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/compliance-financial-products.md): Learn how to remain compliant with financial regulations when offering financial products in your platform.
- [Account statements for business accounts and Issuing](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/compliance-financial-products/account-statements.md): Learn about the requirements for account statements that you present to your users for business accounts and issued cards.

- [Customer service and support](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/compliance-financial-products/customer-service-support.md): Learn about the compliance guidelines you need to follow when offering support to your users.
- [EU depositor information sheet](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/compliance-financial-products/eu-depositor-info-sheet.md): Information about deposit protection in the EU.
- [Foreign exchange fees](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/compliance-financial-products/foreign-exchange-fees.md): Learn about foreign exchange fees.
- [Registration as an intermediary in France](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/compliance-financial-products/french-intermediary.md): To be allowed to offer financial products to French users, register as an intermediary with ORIAS.
- [Keeping records](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/compliance-financial-products/keeping-records.md): Learn about the guidelines for keeping records regarding financial products.
- [Material for marketing and communication with users](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/compliance-financial-products/marketing-user-communication.md): Learn about the requirements and review process for your collateral material about financial product offerings.

- [Additional user interface requirements for Capital](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/compliance-financial-products/user-interface/capital-requirements.md): Learn about the additional compliance requirements for your user interface related to offering Capital.

- [Custom payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/custom-payouts.md): Pay out your user's funds to their verified bank account.
- [Configure settlement delay](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/custom-payouts/configure-settlement-delay.md): Learn how you can change the default settlement delay for your users' balance accounts.
- [Initiate on-demand payouts](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/custom-payouts/on-demand-payouts.md): Initiate an on-demand payout to your user's verified bank account.

- [Payment facilitators](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/in-person-payments/payment-facilitators.md): Learn what additional information you must provide with your transactions if you are a payment facilitator.

- [Split payments at capture](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/in-person-payments/split-transactions/split-payments-at-capture.md): Learn how to split a transaction at the time of capture.
- [Split refunds](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/in-person-payments/split-transactions/split-refunds.md): Split a refund between the balance accounts in your platform.

- [Refund with split instructions](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/in-person-payments/split-transactions/split-refunds/refund-split-instructions.md): Split a refund between the balance accounts in your platform.
- [Surcharge](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/in-person-payments/surcharge.md): Pass on payment acceptance fees to customers as a surcharge to their payments.
- [Configuration-based surcharge](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/in-person-payments/surcharge/configuration.md): Define rules for surcharge amounts or percentages, and when to apply them.
- [Dynamic surcharge](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/in-person-payments/surcharge/dynamic.md): Provide the surcharge amount in your Terminal API request.
- [Tipping](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/in-person-payments/tipping.md): Implement tipping (gratuity) in your payment flow.
- [Transaction fees](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/in-person-payments/transaction-fees.md): Learn how you can handle the fees incurred by transactions.

- [Return transferred funds](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/internal-fund-transfers/return-transfers.md): Return funds to the sender of the original internal transfer, without creating a new transfer.
- [Schedule internal funds transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/internal-fund-transfers/scheduled-fund-transfers.md): Create a schedule to automatically transfer funds between balance accounts within your platform.

- [User-level reporting](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/first-year-focus/platform-user-level-reporting.md): An overview of the key reporting use cases to prioritize for your platform's users.
- [Liable account summary](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/liable-account-summary.md): View the starting and ending balances of your liable account for a chosen time frame.
- [Reconcile fees](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-fees.md): Track and reconcile fees in your balance platform.
- [Reconcile payments](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-payments.md): Reconcile the funds from payment processing to the accounts in your balance platform.
- [Reconcile fund transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/reconcile-transfers.md): Track payouts (bank transfers) and internal transfers in your balance platform.
- [Verify balances](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reconciliation-use-cases/verify-balances.md): Spot-check account balance positions across your balance platform.
- [Release notes](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/release-notes.md)
- [Reports and fee types](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reports-and-fees.md): Learn about relevant report data and how you can use it to reconcile your balance platform accounts.
- [Balance Platform Accounting Report](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reports-and-fees/balance-platform-accounting-report.md): Get an overview of all financial activities on your balance platform.
- [Balance Platform Balance Report](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reports-and-fees/balance-report.md): Get an overview of the balances across your balance platform.
- [Balance Platform Fee report](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reports-and-fees/fee-report.md): Get an overview of monthly fees charged to your balance platform users.
- [Balance Platform Payout report](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reports-and-fees/payout-report.md): Get an overview of daily, weekly, or monthly payouts to your balance platform users.
- [Balance Platform Statement report](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/reports-and-fees/statement-report.md): Get the starting and ending balance, and the balance changes throughout the day.
- [Settle funds](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/settle-funds.md): Learn how and when funds are made available for you and your users.
- [Configure sales day closing time](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/settle-funds/configure-closing-time.md): Learn how you can configure the closing time for a sales day.
- [Pass-through settlement](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/settle-funds/pass-through-settlement.md): Learn how the pass-through settlement works.
- [Test verification/KYC scenarios](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/test-verification-errors.md): Learn how you can test your error handling flows.
- [Top up balance accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/top-up-balance-account.md): Set up a pull sweep to trigger a direct debit from a verified transfer instrument.
- [Top up on demand](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/top-up-balance-account/on-demand-top-ups.md): Make payment requests to top up balance accounts on demand.
- [Top up on a schedule](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/top-up-balance-account/scheduled-top-ups.md): Set up a pull sweep to trigger a direct debit from a verified transfer instrument.
- [Webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/top-up-balance-account/top-up-webhooks.md): Find out which webhooks Adyen sends for events related to top-ups.
- [Track transactions](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/transfer-transactions.md): Use our API and webhooks to get updates about transactions in your balance platform.
- [Track transactions with API requests](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/transfer-transactions/track-api.md): Use the Transfers API to query transactions in your platform.
- [Track transactions with webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/transfer-transactions/track-webhooks.md): Use transaction webhooks to get real-time updates about fund movements in your platform.
- [Provide tax forms (US only)](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/us-tax-forms.md): Provide a 1099-K or 1099-NEC tax form to your users.
- [Register consent for paperless delivery of tax forms (US only)](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/us-tax-forms-edelivery-consent.md): Check and register user-consent preferences for electronic delivery of US tax forms.
- [Verification process](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/verification-overview.md): Learn how Adyen verifies the users in your platform.
- [User capabilities](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/verification-overview/capabilities.md): Learn what capabilities your users can have in your platform
- [Periodic data reviews](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/verification-overview/data-review-process.md): Learn how Adyen may request your user to verify that their data is up-to-date.
- [Verification types](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/verification-overview/verification-types.md): Collect verification information from your users upfront or in a staggered process.
- [Determine the verification requirements](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/verification-requirements.md): Learn what verification information you must collect from your users
- [Data formats per country/region](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/verification-requirements/data-formats-per-country.md): Find out the accepted identification, registration, and tax ID numbers for each supported country/region.
- [Requirements for document uploads](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/verification-requirements/document-requirements.md): Check the size, file format, and information required when uploading documents.
- [Onboarding guidelines](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/verification-requirements/onboarding-guidelines.md): Learn about best practices for onboarding and see guidance for selected countries/regions
- [Reference for additional capabilities](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/verification-requirements/reference-additional-products.md): Learn what additional information is required to offer financial products to your users, such as business accounts.
- [View payout transfer details](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/view-payout-transfers-details.md): View information about the transfers occurring in your platform.
- [View transfer details](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/view-transfers-details.md): View information about the transfers occurring in your platform.
- [Webhook structures and types for platforms](https://docs.adyen.com/platforms/webhook-types.md): Learn which webhook types are sent for each event.

## Plugins
Connect your existing commerce system to our payments platform.

- [Plugins](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins.md): Connect your existing commerce system to our payments platform.
- [Adobe Commerce](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce.md): Use Adyen's plugin for Adobe Commerce to offer online, in-app, and in-person payments.
- [Customize the plugin](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/customize.md): Learn how to customize your plugin integration with Adyen
- [Go-live checklist](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/go-live-checklist.md): Follow this checklist before you start accepting live payments.
- [Headless integration](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/headless-integration.md): Integrate an Adobe Commerce headless storefront with the Adyen platform.
- [Express checkout](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/headless-integration/express-checkout.md): Integrate express payment methods for your headless Adobe Commerce integration.
- [Manage orders](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/manage-orders.md): Capture, cancel and refund orders in Adobe Commerce.
- [Migrate to a new version](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/migrate-to-a-new-version.md): Follow these instructions to migrate your Adobe Commerce plugin to a new major version
- [Set up Adyen Customer Area](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/set-up-adyen-customer-area.md): To use Adyen's plugin for Adobe Commerce, you need to set up your Customer Area with Adyen.
- [Set up in-person payments](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/set-up-in-person-payments.md): Use our Adobe Commerce plugin to process in-person payments with our terminal API.
- [Set up payment methods](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/set-up-the-payment-methods-in-adobe-commerce.md): Set up the payment methods you want you offer, and customize how they are shown to your shoppers during checkout.
- [Set up the plugin in Adobe Commerce](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/set-up-the-plugin-in-adobe-commerce.md): Install Adyen's plugin for Adobe Commerce, and configure it in your Adobe Commerce admin panel.
- [Manage multiple merchant accounts](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/set-up-the-plugin-in-adobe-commerce/multiple-merchant-accounts.md): Process payments from multiple merchant accounts in your Adobe Commerce installation.
- [Set up tokenization](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/adobe-commerce/set-up-tokenization.md): Store your shopper's payment details for later payments.

- [Cegid Retail Mobile POS and Live Store](https://docs.adyen.com/plugins/cegid-retail-y2/mobile-pos-and-live-store.md): Learn more about using Tap to Pay on iPhone and Pay by Link using Cegid Retail Mobile POS and Live Store.

## In-person payments
Accept payments at the point of sale with our Terminal API and payment terminals.

- [In-person payments](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale.md): Accept payments at the point of sale with our Terminal API and payment terminals.
- [Add information to a payment](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/add-data.md): Send us extra data elements such as application info, tender options, and additional data.
- [SaleToAcquirerData](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/add-data/sale-to-acquirer-data.md)
- [Use tender options](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/add-data/tender-options.md): Use parameters to change how a transaction is processed.
- [Card application selection](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/aid-selection-rules.md): Payment method priority and least cost routing for co-badged and combo cards.
- [Alternative payment methods](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods.md): Accept advanced wallet and gift cards payments.
- [Meal voucher payments in Brazil](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/brazil-vouchers.md): Accept meal and food voucher payments in accordance with the Brazilian Worker Food Program (PAT).
- [Gift cards and other stored value cards](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/gift-cards-terminal-api.md): Use Terminal API for transactions with stored value cards like gift cards and mall cards.
- [Activate a gift card](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/gift-cards-terminal-api/activate.md): Activate a gift card at the point of sale, so a shopper can use it.
- [Deactivate or cash out a gift card](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/gift-cards-terminal-api/deactivate.md): Disable or cash out a gift card at the point of sale.
- [Load funds to a gift card](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/gift-cards-terminal-api/load-a-balance.md): Add funds to a gift card at the point of sale.
- [Make a gift card payment](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/gift-cards-terminal-api/payment.md): Make a gift card payment at the point of sale.
- [Check the balance of a gift card](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/gift-cards-terminal-api/query-the-balance.md): Query the balance of a gift card at the point of sale.
- [Make a refund to a gift card](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/gift-cards-terminal-api/refund-gift-cards.md): Make a referenced refund if you have the original payment data, or an unreferenced refund if you do not.
- [Undo a load transaction to a gift card](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/gift-cards-terminal-api/void.md): Reverse a transaction that loaded funds to a gift card.
- [One-time numeric code payments](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/otc-digit-based-payments.md): Accept one-time numeric code payments with BLIK.
- [QR code wallet payments](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/alternative-payment-methods/qr-code-wallets.md): Accept wallet payments with a QR code initiated from the terminal or the POS, or scanned from the shopper's phone.
- [Android terminals](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals.md): Learn about Android payment terminals and the Android apps you can install on them.
- [Accessibility mode on Android terminals](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/accessibility-mode.md): Learn how to make the terminal read out instructions to make accessible payments for visually impaired shoppers.
- [Accessibility mode from the POS app](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/accessibility-mode/accessibility-from-pos.md): Learn how to make the terminal read out instructions to make accessible payments for visually impaired shoppers from your POS app.
- [Accessibility mode from the terminal](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/accessibility-mode/accessibility-from-terminal.md): Learn how to make the terminal read out instructions to make accessible payments for visually impaired shoppers from your terminal.
- [Android app requirements](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/app-requirements.md): Learn about the requirements and testing of apps for Android payment terminals.
- [Deploy apps to your terminals](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/deploy-apps.md): Upload apps to Adyen and make them available on your Android payment terminals.
- [Deploy using profiles](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/deploy-apps/profiles.md): Create Android profiles in your Customer Area to manage the deployment of apps to your Android terminals.
- [Schedule deployment using the Customer Area](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/deploy-apps/schedule.md): Use your Customer Area to schedule installing or uninstalling apps and certificates on Android payment terminals.
- [Schedule terminal actions to deploy apps](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/deploy-apps/terminal-actions-api.md): Use the Management API to schedule actions on terminals, specifically installing and uninstalling Android apps and certificates.
- [Upload apps and certificates](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/deploy-apps/upload.md): Upload apps and certificates to Adyen for your Android payment terminals.
- [Kiosk mode](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/kiosk-mode.md): Enable kiosk mode from your Customer Area.
- [Barcode scanning](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/scan-barcode.md): Scan barcodes with a payment terminal.
- [Activate scanning multiple barcodes using Terminal API](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/scan-barcode/batch-session.md): Create a batch scanning session to scan multiple barcodes.
- [Activate barcode scanning using the scan button on the terminal](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/scan-barcode/button-scan.md): Use the barcode scanning button on the terminal to activate the scanner.
- [Activate scanning a single barcode using Terminal API](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/scan-barcode/single-session.md): Create a scanning session to scan a single barcode.
- [Remote troubleshooting](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/start-remote-session.md): Start a remote session and access your terminals remotely.
- [Customize your Android payment terminals with themes](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/android-terminals/themes.md): Create and manage themes that show during the payment flow on Android payment terminals.
- [Automate the management of your terminals](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/automating-terminal-management.md): Use APIs to order, assign, and configure payment terminals.
- [Assign terminals](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/automating-terminal-management/assign-terminals-api.md): Assign your terminals using our Management API.
- [Use API calls to configure terminals](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/automating-terminal-management/configure-terminals-api.md): Configure payment terminal settings using our Management API.
- [Order terminals](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/automating-terminal-management/order-terminals-api.md): Use our Management API to order payment terminals and accessories.
- [Autonomous stores](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/autonomous-stores.md): Use Adyen payment terminals to process payments and grant access to unattended stores.
- [Implement the payment flow](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration.md): Requests and features that are minimally required in a Terminal API integration.
- [Cancel an in-progress transaction](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/cancel-a-transaction.md): Learn how to cancel a transaction while it is in-progress.
- [Generate receipts](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/generate-receipts.md): Learn about compliant transaction receipts and printing receipts on terminals with a build-in printer.
- [Make a payment](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/make-a-payment.md): Make an in-person card payment.
- [Greece tax regulations](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/make-a-payment/greece-tax.md): Stay compliant when accepting in-person payments in Greece on Adyen payment terminals.
- [Pass application information](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/pass-application-information.md): Provide platform, merchant application, and merchant device details to the Adyen Payments Platform.
- [Refund a payment](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/refund-payment.md): Learn how to issue a point of sale refund.
- [Cancel an unreferenced refund](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/refund-payment/cancel-unreferenced.md): Learn how to cancel an unreferenced refund request before it is completed.
- [Referenced refund](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/refund-payment/referenced.md): Issue a point-of-sale refund connected to the original payment.
- [Outcome of a refund](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/refund-payment/refund-webhooks.md): Receive webhooks with the outcome of referenced or unreferenced refunds.
- [Unreferenced refund](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/refund-payment/unreferenced.md): Issue a point-of-sale refund to any card presented to the payment terminal.
- [Verify transaction status](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/basic-tapi-integration/verify-transaction-status.md): Learn how to verify the status of a transaction when you don't receive a response.
- [Capture](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/capturing-payments.md): Capture in-person payments automatically, with a delay, or manually.
- [Card acquisition](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/card-acquisition.md): Check the card and cardholder details before or outside of a payment.
- [Receive card and shopper identifiers](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/card-acquisition/identifiers.md): Understand the data you may want to collect in shopper recognition use cases.
- [Shopper insights](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/card-acquisition/insights.md): Analyze payment data to anticipate needs and identify trends.
- [Cardholder Verification Methods](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/cardholder-verification-methods.md)
- [Cashback](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/cashback-and-cash-out.md): Obtain a small amount of cash from a card with a purchase or without a purchase (cashout).
- [Deprecation of classic libraries](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/classic-library-deprecation.md): Why and when you will not be able to use POS libraries anymore.
- [Dynamic Currency Conversion](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/currency-conversion.md): Use Dynamic Currency Conversion to let shoppers pay in their own currency.
- [View the DCC dashboard](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/currency-conversion/download-and-use-the-dcc-overview-file.md): View the Dynamic Currency Conversion dashboard and download it as a CSV file.
- [Custom cards](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/custom-cards.md): Use our payment terminals to read cards that are not compliant with PCI DSS.
- [Design your integration](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/design-your-integration.md): Learn about the basic choices to make for your in-person payments integration.
- [Choose an integration architecture](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/design-your-integration/choose-your-architecture.md): Learn about local and cloud integrations with Adyen payment terminals.
- [Building a cloud integration](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/design-your-integration/choose-your-architecture/cloud.md): Learn how to build an integration with cloud communications.
- [Building a local integration](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/design-your-integration/choose-your-architecture/local.md): Learn how to build a Terminal API integration with local communications.
- [Protect with your own code](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/design-your-integration/choose-your-architecture/local/protect.md): Write your own code to protect local communications between your POS app and terminal.
- [Protect with a library](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/design-your-integration/choose-your-architecture/local/protect-with-library.md): Use an Adyen GitHub library to protect local communications between your POS app and terminal.

- [Override the amount to tip on](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/tipping/tipping-from-terminal/change-amount-to-tip-on.md): Specify the part of the total transaction amount that shoppers can add a tip on.
- [Override configured tipping options](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/tipping/tipping-from-terminal/override-tipping-configuration.md): Offer shoppers tipping options on the terminal to match different tipping scenarios.
- [Tipping on the receipt](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/tipping/tipping-on-receipt.md): Implement tipping on the receipt with authorization adjustment or overcapture.
- [Get started manuals](https://docs.adyen.com/point-of-sale/user-manuals.md): Learn how to set up the terminal, connect it to your network, and use the menus.
