## Release notes
Learn about the latest updates from Adyen.

- [Release notes](https://docs.adyen.com/release-notes.md): Learn about the latest updates from Adyen.

## Reporting
Adyen reports show you information about your transactions.

- [Reporting](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting.md): Adyen reports show you information about your transactions.
- [3D Secure](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/3d-secure.md): Find details of your 3D Secure transactions.
- [3DS Authentication report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/3d-secure/3ds-authentication-report.md): Analyze 3D Secure authentication performance.
- [3D Secure Authentication report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/3d-secure/authentication-report.md): Find 3D Secure authentication data.
- [Conversion report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/3d-secure/conversion-report.md): Find 3D Secure conversion data.
- [Account Updater results](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/account-updater-results.md): Use this report to find the details of Account Updater requests.
- [Get reports automatically](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/automatically-get-reports.md): Learn how to generate and download Adyen reports automatically.
- [Balance transfers](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/balance-transfers.md): Get the details of the balance transfers in your settlement batches.
- [Company Payout report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/balance-transfers/company-payout-report.md): Use this report for an overview of payouts.
- [Closing your fiscal period](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/closing-your-fiscal-period.md): Use the balances in Adyen reports to close your fiscal period
- [Accounts receivable balance positions](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/closing-your-fiscal-period/account-receivable-position-dashboard.md): Learn how to view the open balances and positions for an account, and download all transactions that comprise those balances.
- [Monthly and Daily finance reports](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/closing-your-fiscal-period/monthly-and-daily-finance-report.md): Use these reports to review payment activity for a given period.
- [Dynamic Currency Conversion (DCC) transactions and fees](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/dcc-transactions-and-fees.md): See if transactions used DCC and the associated markup fees.
- [Disputed transactions](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/disputed-transactions.md): Find details of disputed transactions.
- [Donation campaigns](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/donation-campaigns.md): Get insights on your donation campaigns using our dashboard and report.
- [Dynamic sales day closing time](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/dynamic-sales-day.md): Change the sales day closing time for a specific night.
- [Invoice reconciliation guide](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/invoice-reconciliation.md): Learn how to reconcile your invoices with Adyen
- [Payment accounting report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/invoice-reconciliation/payment-accounting-report.md): Use this report to match up fees to payment statuses and perform invoice reconciliation.
- [Payment processing invoice](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/invoice-reconciliation/payment-processing-invoice.md): The invoice shows an itemized list of costs for Adyen's payment services.
- [Generate and download reports manually](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/manually-get-reports.md): Learn how to generate and download Adyen reports manually.
- [Canada Code of Conduct - Merchant statements](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/merchant-statements-ccc.md): Create a merchant report that shows the aggregate fees and effective merchant discount rate of each payment method.
- [Modifications not processed](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/modifications-not-processed.md): Find the modifications that were not processed.
- [Platform reports](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/platform-reports.md): Learn where to find reports for your platform or marketplace.
- [Received payment details report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/received-payment-details-report.md): Use this report to get details about authorised and refused payments, including the shopper interaction, risk score, and acquirer response.
- [Reports and the payments lifecycle](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/reports-and-the-payments-lifecycle.md): Learn how Adyen reports show transactions at different stages of the payments lifecycle.
- [Sales to payouts dashboard](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/sales-and-payouts-dashboard.md): Learn how to use your Sales to payouts dashboard.
- [Settlement reconciliation](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/settlement-reconciliation.md)
- [Batch-level reconciliation](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/settlement-reconciliation/batch-level.md): Learn to reconcile your payout batches for a specific date range.
- [Aggregate settlement details report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/settlement-reconciliation/batch-level/aggregate-settlement-details-report.md): Use this report to reconcile your settlements on a batch level.
- [Transaction-level reconciliation](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/settlement-reconciliation/transaction-level.md): Learn to reconcile the transactions in a batch.
- [Advancements detail report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/settlement-reconciliation/transaction-level/advancements-detail-report.md): Use this report to get transaction level information of the funding for an advancement.
- [External settlement detail report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/settlement-reconciliation/transaction-level/external-settlement-detail-report.md): Use this report to review payments settled by an external acquirer.
- [Installments and advancements in Brazil](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/settlement-reconciliation/transaction-level/reconcile-installment-payments.md): Understand credit card installments and advancements in Brazil.
- [Settlement details report](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/settlement-reconciliation/transaction-level/settlement-details-report.md): Use report to reconcile your settlements on a transaction level.
- [Time zone setting](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/time-zone-setting.md): Learn how the time zone setting affects how Adyen reports are generated.
- [Your payment terminals](https://docs.adyen.com/reporting/your-payment-terminals.md): Learn how to use the POS terminal fleet Scheduled report.

## Risk management
Use the Protect risk engine to minimize fraud and maximize authorization rates.

- [Risk management](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management.md): Use the Protect risk engine to minimize fraud and maximize authorization rates.
- [Automate submitting referrals](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/automate-submitting-referrals.md)
- [Referrals API reference](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/automate-submitting-referrals/referrals-api-reference.md)
- [Address Verification System (AVS)](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/avs-checks.md): Set up and use Address Verification System (AVS) checks to reduce fraud risk.
- [Case management](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/case-management.md): Manually review a transaction before it is captured, as a second layer of enforcement on top of risk rules.
- [Chargeback guidelines](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines.md): Learn what you need to do to manage chargebacks for each issuer.
- [Accel & STAR chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/accel-star-chargebacks.md): Learn about the Accel & STAR chargeback process and the guidelines to defend a chargeback.
- [ACH Direct Debit chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/ach-chargebacks.md): Learn about ACH returns and when you can retry an ACH Direct Debit payment.
- [Afterpay and Clearpay chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/afterpay-chargebacks.md): Learn about the chargeback process with Afterpay, Cash App Afterpay, and Clearpay, and the guidelines to defend a chargeback.
- [American Express chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/american-express-chargebacks.md): Learn about the American Express chargeback process and the guidelines to dispute a chargeback.
- [India domestic chargebacks with BillDesk](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/billdesk-chargebacks.md)
- [Cartes Bancaires chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/cartes-bancaires-chargebacks.md)
- [Cash App Pay chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/cash-app-pay-chargebacks.md): Learn about the Cash App Pay chargeback process and the guidelines to dispute a chargeback.
- [Diners/Discover chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/diners-discover-chargebacks.md): Learn about the Diners/Discover chargeback process and the guidelines to dispute a chargeback.
- [eftpos chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/eftpos-chargebacks.md)
- [Elo chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/elo-chargebacks.md): Learn about the chargeback process for Elo cards and the guidelines to dispute a chargeback.
- [JCB chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/jcb-chargebacks.md): Learn about the JCB chargeback process and the guidelines to dispute a chargeback.
- [Klarna chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/klarna-chargebacks.md): Learn about the Klarna dispute process and guidelines.
- [Mastercard chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/mastercard-chargebacks.md): Learn about the Mastercard chargeback process and the guidelines to dispute a chargeback.
- [Mexico domestic chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/mexicodomestic-chargebacks.md): Learn about the Mexico domestic chargeback process and the guidelines to defend a chargeback.
- [NYCE chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/nyce-chargebacks.md): Learn about the NYCE chargeback process and the guidelines to defend a chargeback.
- [PayPal chargeback process for marketplaces](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/paypal-chargebacks.md): Learn about the PayPal chargeback process for marketplaces, and the guidelines to defend a chargeback.
- [PULSE chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/pulse-chargebacks.md): Learn about the PULSE chargeback process and the guidelines to defend a chargeback.
- [Riverty chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/riverty-chargebacks.md): Learn about the Riverty chargeback process and guidelines.
- [SEPA chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/sepa-chargebacks.md)
- [TWINT chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/twint-chargebacks.md): Learn about the TWINT chargeback process and the guidelines to dispute a chargeback.
- [UnionPay chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/unionpay-chargebacks.md): Learn about the UnionPay chargeback process and the guidelines to dispute a chargeback.
- [Visa chargebacks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-guidelines/visa-chargebacks.md): Learn about the Visa chargeback process and the guidelines to dispute a chargeback.
- [Chargeback Uploader](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/chargeback-uploader.md): Use chargeback information from a third party acquirer for risk management.
- [Configure risk settings](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/configure-risk-settings.md): Use your Customer Area to turn on and configure risk management features.
- [Configure your risk profile](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/configure-your-risk-profile.md): Learn how to set up your risk profile, get insights into risk performance, and how machine learning helps detect and prevent fraud.
- [Custom rules](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/configure-your-risk-profile/custom-rules.md): Build your own custom risk rules around the unique fraud risks faced by your business.
- [Machine learning rules](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/configure-your-risk-profile/machine-learning-rules.md): Benefit from machine learning rules to evaluate the risk of transactions.
- [Post-authorization rules](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/configure-your-risk-profile/post-auth-rules.md): Use post-authorization signals in risk rules to block or allow a transaction.
- [Data quality and risk field reference](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/configure-your-risk-profile/risk-field-reference.md): Learn which fields to include in your payment request to improve the risk evaluation, and trigger risk rules.
- [Risk lists](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/configure-your-risk-profile/risk-lists.md): Use lists of known shopper details to block or allow a transaction.
- [Control traffic](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/control-traffic.md): Learn about how and why we add transactions to control traffic.
- [Create and assign risk profiles](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/create-a-risk-profile.md): Create risk profiles to manage risk.
- [Monitor risk performance](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/dispute-and-fraud-monitoring.md): Learn how you can get insights into risk performance.
- [Manage disputes with the Disputes API](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/disputes-api.md): Automate your process of handling disputes using our Defend Disputes API.
- [Dispute webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/disputes-api/dispute-notifications.md): Learn about dispute events that trigger a webhook message.
- [Disputes API reference](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/disputes-api/disputes-api-reference.md): Learn about possible errors, and the different defense reasons and document type codes that can be returned using the Disputes API.
- [Test a chargeback scenario](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/disputes-api/test-applicable-dispute-reasons.md): Simulate chargebacks by submitting dispute reason codes in your payment request.
- [Dynamic 3D Secure](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/dynamic-3d-secure.md): Set up rules to determine which card payments are routed through 3D Secure authentication, and if they should be challenged.
- [Data collection to detect fraud](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/fraud-data-collection.md): Learn more about the types of data you can collect using Web integrations, and how Protect uses that data to detect and mitigate fraud.
- [Fraud results in API responses and webhooks](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/handle-risk-rule-notifications.md): Learn how to include risk information and results in the API response and webhooks to inform you when payment requests trigger risk rules.
- [Manage disputes](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/manage-disputes.md): After you receive a chargeback you can either accept it, or defend it.
- [Run A/B test experiments](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/run-ab-test-experiments.md): Compare the performance of two risk profiles.
- [Skip risk rules](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/skip-risk-rules.md)
- [Standalone risk](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/standalone-risk.md)
- [Understanding and defending disputes](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/understanding-disputes.md): Learn how disputes work and how to defend them.
- [Dispute flow](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/understanding-disputes/dispute-process-and-flow.md): Learn about the dispute flow, the various stages of a dispute, and how to to follow a dispute through the flow.
- [Dispute reason codes and defense requirements](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/understanding-disputes/dispute-reason-codes.md): Learn about dispute reason codes and which documents to provide to defend different types of disputes.
- [Dispute timeframes](https://docs.adyen.com/risk-management/understanding-disputes/dispute-timeframes.md): Review the different timeframes for handling the dispute process.

## Omnichannel
Get insights and build customer journeys across sales channels.

- [Omnichannel](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce.md): Get insights and build customer journeys across sales channels.
- [Collect data](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/collect-data.md): Collect customer identifiers to run your own analyses.
- [Digital receipts](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/digital-receipts.md): Send digital receipts for in-person transactions.
- [Endless aisle](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/endless-aisle.md): Let shoppers place ecommerce orders in your store.
- [Shopper loyalty](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/loyalty-program.md): Recognize customers and turn their payment card into a loyalty card.
- [Creating customer profiles](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/loyalty-program/create-profiles.md): Create a profile for your customers, both online and at the point of sale.
- [Payment-linked loyalty program](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/loyalty-program/payment-linked-loyalty.md): Offer a loyalty program without a separate loyalty card or app.
- [Recognizing customers](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/loyalty-program/recognize-customers.md): Identify your returning customers when they purchase in your online and physical stores.
- [Mail Order/Telephone Order (MOTO) payments](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/mail-order-telephone-order.md): Accept payments by mail or telephone.
- [MOTO payments through API](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/mail-order-telephone-order/api-request.md): Make API requests to make Mail Order/Telephone Order (MOTO) payments.
- [MOTO payments through Customer Area](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/mail-order-telephone-order/customer-area.md): Use Virtual Terminal to accept Mail Order/Telephone Order (MOTO) payments.
- [Pay by Link](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/pay-by-link.md): Accept payments using an Adyen payment page.
- [Create payment links](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/pay-by-link/create-payment-links.md): How to create Pay by Link payment links
- [Pay by Link through the API](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/pay-by-link/create-payment-links/api.md): Learn how to create payment links through the API.
- [Payment links through the Customer Area](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/pay-by-link/create-payment-links/customer-area.md): Learn how to create payment links through the Customer Area.
- [Payment links through the iOS app](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/pay-by-link/ios-app.md): Use the iOS app to create and manage payment links.
- [Release notes](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/pay-by-link/release-notes.md)
- [Settings](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/pay-by-link/settings.md): Configure the available options for creating payment links through your Customer Area.
- [Supported payment methods](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/pay-by-link/supported-payment-methods.md): Learn about the supported payment methods for Pay by Link.
- [Referenced refunds](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/referenced-refunds.md): Enable omnichannel returns with simple reconciliation and better fraud protection.
- [Shopper engagement](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/shopper-engagement.md): Interact with customers and personalize your offering.
- [Shopper experiences](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/shopper-experiences.md): Provide customers with flexible purchase journeys.
- [Shopper insights](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/shopper-insights.md): Use identifiers in payment details to understand your customers.
- [Bespoke interaction on the terminal](https://docs.adyen.com/unified-commerce/terminal-interaction.md): Collect information using the terminal, and show information on the display.

## Adyen Uplift
Find out more about how you can use Adyen Uplift to increase payment conversion, simplify fraud management, and reduce the cost of payments.

- [Adyen Uplift](https://docs.adyen.com/uplift.md): Find out more about how you can use Adyen Uplift to increase payment conversion, simplify fraud management, and reduce the cost of payments.
- [Adyen Uplift experiments](https://docs.adyen.com/uplift/uplift-experiments.md): Learn more about how you can start, evaluate, and stop experiments.
- [Adyen Uplift requirements and recommendations](https://docs.adyen.com/uplift/uplift-requirements.md): Learn more about required and recommended integration options, and which fields to include in your payment requests to make the best use of Adyen Uplift.
